
# Data loading
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
library(pROC)
library(rcdk)
library(ospsuite)
library(patchwork)
library(ggnewscale)

# ensure working directory is set correctly
# XXX/code + figures

workingDirectory = "C:/Users/User/OneDrive - Uniklinik RWTH Aachen/PhD/R model files/analysis/2024_06_14 Zeynep DILI/data/superdata v2/GitHub Repo/code + figures"

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = workingDirectory)

setwd(workingDirectory)

simulatable = read_xlsx("../data/Collected data/Drug literature data.xlsx")

input_table = read_xlsx("../data/Collected data/Predicted Compound Properties.xlsx")


simulatable$compoundName[simulatable$compoundSMILES == "CCOC(=O)NC1=C(N=C(C=C1)NCC2=CC=C(C=C2)F)N" &
                            simulatable$CmaxDoseValue == 400] = "Flupirtine_400"
simulatable$compoundName[simulatable$compoundSMILES == "CCOC(=O)NC1=C(N=C(C=C1)NCC2=CC=C(C=C2)F)N" &
                            simulatable$CmaxDoseValue == 600] = "Flupirtine_600"


input_table$compoundName[input_table$compoundID == 144] = "Flupirtine_400"
input_table$compoundName[input_table$compoundID == 230] = "Flupirtine_600"


simulatable = simulatable %>%
  mutate(firstName = sub(";.*", "", compoundName))

compoundInfoMerg = input_table %>%
  mutate(MolWeight = MW) %>%
  select("compoundID", "compoundName", "compoundSMILES", "compoundCID", "InVivoClearance",
        "ADMETLab_Fu", "ADMETLab_logD", "ADMETLab_logP", "ADMETLab_logS", "MolWeight")  %>%
  mutate(firstName = sub(";.*", "", compoundName))


compoundInfoMerg = compoundInfoMerg[compoundInfoMerg$firstName %in% simulatable$firstName,]
simulatable = simulatable[simulatable$firstName %in% compoundInfoMerg$firstName,]

simulatable = merge(compoundInfoMerg, simulatable, by = c("firstName", "compoundSMILES"),
                    all = T, sort = F) %>%
  mutate(compoundName = compoundName.y) %>%
  select(-c(compoundName.x, compoundName.y))


ZeynepClasses = read_xlsx("../data/Collected data/DILI pattern classification.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(firstName = sub(";.*", "", compoundName)) %>%
  mutate(CholestasisCombined = CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDER) %>%
  select(firstName, CholestasisCombined, CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert)

simulatable = merge(simulatable, ZeynepClasses, by = "firstName", all.x = T)  %>%
  mutate(CholestasisCombined = as.character(CholestasisCombined)) %>%
  mutate(CholestasisCombined = ifelse(is.na(CholestasisCombined) & !is.na(DILIConcern) &
                                        DILIConcern == "Clinical Dev", "Clinical Dev", CholestasisCombined)) %>%
  # mutate(CholestasisCombined = ifelse(firstName == "MIFEPRISTONE", "Mifepristone", CholestasisCombined) ) %>%
  mutate(CholestasisCombined = ifelse(is.na(CholestasisCombined), "NA", CholestasisCombined)) %>%
  mutate(CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert = as.character(CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert)) %>%
  mutate(CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert = ifelse(is.na(CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert) & !is.na(DILIConcern) &
                                        DILIConcern == "Clinical Dev", "Clinical Dev", CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert)) %>%
  # mutate(CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert = ifelse(firstName == "MIFEPRISTONE", "Mifepristone", CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert) ) %>%
  mutate(CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert = ifelse(is.na(CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert), "NA", CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert))
  


#Expert DILI pattern
expertDILIPattern = read_xlsx("../data/Collected data/Literature DILI pattern info.xlsx") %>%
  select(compoundSMILES, pattern) %>%
  rename(expertDILIPattern = pattern) 

simulatable = simulatable %>%
  select(-expertDILIPattern)

simulatable = merge(simulatable, expertDILIPattern, by = "compoundSMILES", all.x = T) %>%
  mutate(expertDILIPattern = ifelse(is.na(expertDILIPattern) & !is.na(DILIConcern) &
                                      DILIConcern == "Clinical Dev", "Clinical Dev",
                                    expertDILIPattern)) %>%
  mutate(expertDILIPattern = ifelse(is.na(expertDILIPattern) & CholestasisCombined == "1",
                                    "cholestatic",
                                    expertDILIPattern)) %>%
  mutate(expertDILIPattern = ifelse(is.na(expertDILIPattern) & CholestasisCombined == "Mifepristone",
                                    "cholestatic",
                                    expertDILIPattern)) %>%
  mutate(expertDILIPattern = ifelse(is.na(expertDILIPattern) & CholestasisCombined == "0",
                                    "safe",
                                    expertDILIPattern)) %>%  
  mutate(expertDILIPattern = ifelse(is.na(expertDILIPattern), "unknown", expertDILIPattern)) %>%
  
  mutate(cholestasisIntegrated = NA) %>%
  mutate(cholestasisIntegrated = case_when(
                                  expertDILIPattern == "cholestatic" &
                                    (CholestasisCombined == "1" |
                                     CholestasisCombined == "NA") ~ "cholestatic",
                                  expertDILIPattern == "cholestatic" &
                                    CholestasisCombined == "0" ~ "contradiction",
                                  
                                  expertDILIPattern == "hepatocellular" &
                                     CholestasisCombined == "NA" ~ "hepatocellular",
                                  expertDILIPattern == "hepatocellular" &
                                    (CholestasisCombined == "1"|
                                       CholestasisCombined == "0") ~ "contradiction",
         
                                  expertDILIPattern == "unknown" &
                                     CholestasisCombined == "NA" ~ "unknown",
                                  expertDILIPattern == "unknown" &
                                       CholestasisCombined == "0" ~ "safe",
                                  expertDILIPattern == "unknown" &
                                       CholestasisCombined == "1" ~ "cholestatic",
                                  expertDILIPattern == "safe" ~ "safe",
                                  expertDILIPattern == "Clinical Dev" ~ "Clinical Dev"
                                  ))
                                           
                                           
                          

#PBBA results
PBBAResults = read_xlsx("../data/Simulation results/HTPBK-PBBA results.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold_Hours = OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold/60) %>%
  mutate(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove1_1Cmax_Hours = OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove1_1Cmax/60)

simulatable = merge(simulatable, PBBAResults, by = "compoundID", all.x = T)




CmaxPredictions = read_xlsx("../data/Simulation results/AllCmaxValuesMerged.xlsx")


simulatable = simulatable %>%
  mutate(numOfPODValues = str_count(PODValues, fixed(";"))) %>%
  mutate(DILIst = ifelse(is.na(DILIst) & !is.na(DILIConcern) & DILIConcern == "Clinical Dev",
                         "Risk", DILIst)) %>%
  mutate(DILIConcernNarrow = NA) %>%
  mutate(DILIConcernNarrow = ifelse(!is.na(DILIConcern) & (DILIConcern == "Most-DILI-Concern" |
                                                               DILIConcern == "Clinical Dev"),
                         "Most-Clinical", DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  mutate(DILIConcernNarrow = ifelse(!is.na(DILIConcern) & DILIConcern == "No-DILI-Concern",
                         "No", DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  mutate(DILIConcernWide = NA) %>%
  mutate(DILIConcernWide = ifelse(!is.na(DILIConcern) & (DILIConcern == "Less-DILI-Concern" |
                                                         DILIConcern == "Most-DILI-Concern" |
                                                         DILIConcern == "Clinical Dev"),
                         "Less-Most-Clinical", DILIConcernWide)) %>%
  mutate(DILIConcernWide = ifelse(!is.na(DILIConcern) & DILIConcern == "No-DILI-Concern",
                         "No", DILIConcernWide)) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number()) %>%
  mutate(jitter = rnorm(n(), mean = 0, sd = 1))



simulatable = merge(CmaxPredictions, simulatable, by = "compoundID")


simulatable = simulatable %>%
  mutate(Error = log2(firstPlasmaCmax / medianCmax)) %>%
  mutate(AbsError = abs(log2(firstPlasmaCmax / medianCmax))) %>%
  mutate(predCmaxWithin10fold = ifelse(AbsError <= log2(10), "Y", "N")) %>%
  mutate(RatioLowestPOD = medianCmax/lowestPOD) %>%
  mutate(RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD = medianCmax/lowestnonBSEPPOD) %>%
  mutate(RatioBSEP = medianCmax/medianBSEPIC50) %>%
  mutate(RatioLowestPODBase0_25 = RatioLowestPOD * 4 ) %>%
  mutate(RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25 = RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD * 4 ) %>%
  mutate(RatioBSEPBase0_25 = RatioBSEP * 4 ) %>%
  mutate(RatioCytoTox = medianCmax/lowestCytoTox) %>%
  mutate(RatioCytoToxBase0_25 = RatioCytoTox * 4 ) %>%
  mutate(RatioMitoTox = medianCmax/lowestMitoTox) %>%
  mutate(RatioMitoToxBase0_25 = RatioMitoTox * 4 ) %>%
  mutate(RatioPredLowestPOD = firstPlasmaCmax/lowestPOD) %>%
  mutate(RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD = firstPlasmaCmax/lowestnonBSEPPOD) %>%
  mutate(RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25 = RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD * 4) %>%
  mutate(RatioPredBSEP = firstPlasmaCmax/medianBSEPIC50) %>%
  mutate(RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25 = RatioPredLowestPOD * 4 ) %>%
  mutate(RatioPredBSEPBase0_25 = RatioPredBSEP * 4 ) %>%
  mutate(absLowestPOD =  medianCmax - lowestPOD) %>%
  mutate(RatioLowestPODUnbound = (medianCmax * ADMETLab_Fu)/lowestPOD)
       


simulatable$DILIConcern = factor(simulatable$DILIConcern, levels = c("No-DILI-Concern","Less-DILI-Concern", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern",  "Most-DILI-Concern",  "Clinical Dev" ))

simulatable$DILIRankBinary = factor(simulatable$DILIRankBinary, levels = c("Safe","Risk"))

simulatable$BinaryDILIConsensus = factor(simulatable$BinaryDILIConsensus, levels = c("Safe","Risk"))

```

#Exclude non-oral drugs
These are actually only available as IV, not oral
```{r}
excludeDrug = paste(c("Dobutamine", "isoproterenol", "Ethacrynic acid", "dacarbazine",
                      "Deferoxamine"),
                    collapse = "|")

simulatable = simulatable %>%
  filter(!grepl(excludeDrug, compoundName))
```

```{r}
TopInSilico = simulatable %>%
  filter(type == "InSilico") %>%
  arrange(compoundID) %>%
  ungroup()

TopInVivo = simulatable %>%
  filter(type == "InVivo") %>%
  arrange(compoundID) %>%
  ungroup()
```


#Compound Property Statistics (Plots)
```{r}
histWidth = 34
histHeight = 27

histData = TopInVivo %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern))

ggplot(histData, aes(x = MolWeight)) + geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  labs(
    x = "Molecular Weight [g/mol]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  )

ggsave("figures/MolWeight Histogram.pdf",  width = histWidth, height = histHeight, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(histData, aes(x = ADMETLab_logP)) + geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  labs(
    x = "LogP"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  )

ggsave("figures/logP Histogram.pdf",  width = histWidth, height = histHeight, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

ggplot(histData, aes(x = ADMETLab_logD)) + geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  labs(
    x = "logD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  )

ggsave("figures/logD Histogram.pdf",  width = histWidth, height = histHeight, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

ggplot(histData, aes(x = ADMETLab_logS)) + geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  labs(
    x = "LogS"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  )

ggsave("figures/logS Histogram.pdf",  width = histWidth, height = histHeight, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(histData, aes(x = numOfPODValues)) + geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  labs(
    x = "In vitro values per drug"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  )

ggsave("figures/num of PODs Histogram.pdf",  width = histWidth, height = histHeight, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(histData, aes(x = InVivoClearance)) + geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  labs(
    x = "In vivo Clearance [ml/min/kg]"
  )+
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  scale_x_log10()

ggsave("figures/CL Histogram.pdf",  width = histWidth, height = histHeight, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(histData, aes(x = CmaxDoseValue)) + geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  labs(
    x = "Dose [mg]"
  )+
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  scale_x_log10()

ggsave("figures/Dose Histogram.pdf",  width = histWidth, height = histHeight, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(histData, aes(x = medianCmax)) + geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  labs(
    x = "Cmax [µM]"
  )+
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  scale_x_log10()

ggsave("figures/Cmax Histogram.pdf",  width = histWidth, height = histHeight, units = "mm", dpi = 600)




ggplot(histData, aes(x = medianBSEPIC50)) + geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  labs(
    x = "BSEP IC50 [µM]"
  )+
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  scale_x_log10()

ggsave("figures/BSEPIC50 Histogram.pdf",  width = histWidth, height = histHeight, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(histData, aes(x = lowestCytoTox)) + geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  labs(
    x = "Cytotoxicity [µM]"
  )+
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  scale_x_log10()

ggsave("figures/Cytotoxicity Histogram.pdf",  width = histWidth, height = histHeight, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

ggplot(histData, aes(x = lowestMitoTox)) + geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  labs(
    x = "Mitotoxicity [µM]"
  )+
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  scale_x_log10()

ggsave("figures/Mitotoxicity Histogram.pdf",  width = histWidth, height = histHeight, units = "mm", dpi = 600)




ggplot(histData, aes(x = DILIConcern, fill = DILIConcern)) + geom_histogram(stat = "count") +
  labs(
    x = "DILIrank Class"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red", "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    "Most-DILI-Concern" = "Most",
    "Clinical Dev" = "Clinical Dev",
    "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "Ambiguous",
    "Less-DILI-Concern" = "Less",
    "No-DILI-Concern" = "No"
  ))

ggsave("figures/DILIrank Histogram.pdf",  width = 65, height = 28, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```

```{r}
signif(table(histData$DILIConcern)/nrow(histData), 3)
```


```{r}
library(ggVennDiagram)


vennDiagram = TopInVivo %>%
  select(lowestCytoTox, lowestMitoTox, medianBSEPIC50)

venn_list <- list(
  CytoTox = which(!is.na(vennDiagram$lowestCytoTox)),
  MitoTox = which(!is.na(vennDiagram$lowestMitoTox)),
  BSEP = which(!is.na(vennDiagram$medianBSEPIC50))
)

ggVennDiagram(venn_list, set_color = "black") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
  
ggsave("figures/venn diagram.pdf",  width = 80, height = 30, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


sum(!is.na(vennDiagram$lowestCytoTox))
sum(!is.na(vennDiagram$lowestMitoTox))
sum(!is.na(vennDiagram$medianBSEPIC50))
```

#Cmax pred vs obs

##InVivo CL
```{r}
ggplot(TopInVivo, aes(x = medianCmax, y = firstPlasmaCmax)) + 
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) + 
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = log10(10), linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = -log10(10), linetype = "dashed") + geom_point(aes()) +
  scale_y_log10()  + scale_x_log10()

ggplot(TopInVivo, aes(x = medianCmax, y = firstPlasmaCmax)) + 
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) + 
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = log10(10), linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = -log10(10), linetype = "dashed") + geom_point(aes(colour = `predCmaxWithin10fold`)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Y" = "black", "N" = "red"))  +
  scale_y_log10()  + scale_x_log10()

ggplot(TopInVivo, aes(x = medianCmax, y = firstPlasmaCmax)) + 
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) + 
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = log10(10), linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = -log10(10), linetype = "dashed") + geom_point(aes(colour = DILIConcern)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red", "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  scale_y_log10()  + scale_x_log10()

```

```{r}
sum(TopInVivo$AbsError <= log2(10))/nrow(TopInVivo)
```


##InSilico CL
```{r}
ggplot(TopInSilico, aes(x = medianCmax, y = firstPlasmaCmax)) + 
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) + 
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = log10(10), linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = -log10(10), linetype = "dashed") + geom_point(aes()) +
  scale_y_log10()  + scale_x_log10()

ggplot(TopInSilico, aes(x = medianCmax, y = firstPlasmaCmax)) + 
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) + 
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = log10(10), linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = -log10(10), linetype = "dashed") + geom_point(aes(colour = `predCmaxWithin10fold`)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Y" = "black", "N" = "red"))  +
  scale_y_log10()  + scale_x_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "Observed Cmax [µM]",
    y = "Predicted Cmax [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(5e-5,1e3), ylim = c(5e-5,1e3))

ggsave("figures/InSilico PredvsObs Cmax.pdf",  width = 75, height = 65, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(TopInSilico, aes(x = medianCmax, y = firstPlasmaCmax)) + 
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) + 
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = log10(10), linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = -log10(10), linetype = "dashed") + geom_point(aes(colour = DILIConcern)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red", "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  scale_y_log10()  + scale_x_log10()
```

```{r}
sum(TopInSilico$AbsError <= log2(10))/nrow(TopInSilico)
```


#Ratio: LowestPOD (Obs Cmax)
```{r}
a = TopInVivo %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  # filter(!PODValueSources == "medianBSEPIC50;") %>%
  arrange(RatioLowestPOD) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(a$DILIConcern))
table(a$DILIConcern)

lowestPODForBoxplotComparison = a %>%
  select(DILIConcern, RatioLowestPODBase0_25)
```

##Bar
```{r}
ggplot(a, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioLowestPOD)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(a, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioLowestPOD)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = DILIRankBinary)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(a, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,230))

ggsave("figures/Ratio Lowest POD.pdf",  width = 170, height = 55, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

ggplot(a, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = DILIRankBinary)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()


```


##ROC (Wide)
```{r}
roc_objClinical = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernWide ~ RatioLowestPOD, data = a,
              levels = c("No", "Less-Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))


roc_dfWide <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(roc_objClinical$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(roc_objClinical$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)

ggplot(roc_dfWide, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr)) +
  geom_line(color = "black") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Wide Ratio LowestPOD ROC AUC.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



plot(roc_objClinical, main = "ROC Curve", col = "blue", lwd = 2)
auc(roc_objClinical)
roc_coordsClinical = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "all",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsbest = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "best",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsPerfectSpecificity = coords(roc_objClinical, x = 1, input = "specificity",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

coords(roc_objClinical, x = 0.25, input = "threshold",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

```

##ROC (Narrow)
```{r}
roc_objClinical = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioLowestPOD, data = a,
              levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))

plot(roc_objClinical, main = "ROC Curve", col = "black", lwd = 2)

roc_dfNarrow <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(roc_objClinical$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(roc_objClinical$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)

ggplot(roc_dfNarrow, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr)) +
  geom_line(color = "black") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Narrow Ratio LowestPOD ROC AUC.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


auc(roc_objClinical)

roc_coordsClinical = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "all",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsbest = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "best",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsPerfectSpecificity = coords(roc_objClinical, x = 1, input = "specificity",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

coords(roc_objClinical, x = 0.25, input = "threshold",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
roc_coordsbest
```

##ROC Wide vs Narrow
```{r}
roc_dfNarrow$type <- "Narrow"
roc_dfWide$type <- "Wide"


# Combine data frames into a single dataframe
roc_combined <- rbind(roc_dfNarrow, roc_dfWide)

ggplot(roc_combined, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr, colour = type)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Wide" = "blue",  "Narrow" = "black"))
  

ggsave("figures/Narrow vs Wide Ratio LowestPOD ROC AUC.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```


##Boxplot
```{r}
ggplot(a, aes(x = RatioLowestPOD, fill = DILIConcern)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) +
  scale_x_log10(
  breaks = c(0.0004, 0.04, 1, 40),
  labels = c("1e-04", "1e-02", "0.25", "1e+01")
) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
   # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


ggsave("figures/Ratio LowestPOD boxplot horizontal.pdf",  width = 45, height = 20, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```

```{r}
pairwise.wilcox.test(log10(a$RatioLowestPOD), a$DILIConcern, p.adjust.method = "holm")
```



##Cumulative Distribution
```{r}
ggplot(a, aes(x = RatioLowestPOD, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1)+
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Ratio LowestPOD cumulative.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```

##Prob Distribution
```{r}
ggplot(a, aes(x = RatioLowestPOD, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Ratio LowestPOD prob distribution.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



aLessWithBSEP = a %>%
  filter(DILIConcern == "Less-DILI-Concern")

ggplot(aLessWithBSEP, aes(x = RatioLowestPOD, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = 1, bins = 20) +  # Absolute counts
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",
    "Clinical Dev" = "darkred",
    "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange",
    "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",
    "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) 

nrow(aLessWithBSEP)

```

##Cmax vs lowestPOD (all)
```{r}
riskZone <- data.frame(
  x = c(1e-4, 1e-4, 5e1),
  y = c(5e-3, 1e3,  1e3)
)

safeZone <- data.frame(
  x = c(5e-2, 1e3, 1e3),
  y = c(1e-4, 1e-4,  5e0)
)


ggplot(a, aes(x = lowestPOD , y = medianCmax)) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = riskZone,
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    fill = "red",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = safeZone,
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    fill = "#00E300",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) + geom_point( aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_abline(slope = 1)+ scale_y_log10() + scale_x_log10() +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1e-4, 1000), ylim = c(1e-4, 1000))+ 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.1, linetype = "dashed")+
  labs(
    x = "Lowest POD [µM]",
    y = "Cmax [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + theme(legend.position = "none") 
 

ggsave("figures/Cmax vs Lowest POD.pdf",  width = 70, height = 60, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


```

##Bar (DILIst)

```{r}
b = TopInVivo %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(BinaryDILIConsensus)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  arrange(RatioLowestPOD) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(a$BinaryDILIConsensus))
table(a$BinaryDILIConsensus)


ggplot(b, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioLowestPOD)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = BinaryDILIConsensus)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()


ggplot(b, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = BinaryDILIConsensus)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()
```

##ROC (DILIst)
```{r}
roc_objClinical = suppressMessages(roc(BinaryDILIConsensus ~ RatioLowestPOD, data = b,
              levels = c("Safe", "Risk"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
plot(roc_objClinical, main = "ROC Curve", col = "blue", lwd = 2)
auc(roc_objClinical)
roc_coordsClinical = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "all",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsbest = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "best",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsPerfectSpecificity = coords(roc_objClinical, x = 1, input = "specificity",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

coords(roc_objClinical, x = 0.25, input = "threshold",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

```


##List of false pos/neg
```{r}
potFalsePos = TopInVivo %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  arrange(desc(RatioLowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(RatioLowestPOD > 0.05) %>%
  filter(!BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk") %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
  select(-c(1:35))  %>%
  select(compoundName, DILIConcern, BinaryDILIConsensus,
         medianCmax, lowestPOD,  PODValues, PODValueSources, CmaxDoseValue, CmaxDoseUnit, CmaxValueSources, RatioLowestPOD)

closeToPotFalsePos = TopInVivo %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  arrange(desc(RatioLowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(RatioLowestPOD < 0.05 & RatioLowestPOD > 0.0075) %>%
  filter(!BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk") %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
  select(-c(1:35)) %>%
  select(compoundName, DILIConcern, BinaryDILIConsensus,
         medianCmax, lowestPOD,  PODValues, PODValueSources, CmaxDoseValue, CmaxDoseUnit, CmaxValueSources, RatioLowestPOD)


potFalseNeg = TopInVivo %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(BinaryDILIConsensus)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  arrange(RatioLowestPOD) %>%
  filter(RatioLowestPOD < 0.1) %>%
  filter(!BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe") %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
  select(-c(1:35))  %>%
  select(compoundName, DILIConcern, BinaryDILIConsensus,
         medianCmax, lowestPOD,  PODValues, PODValueSources, CmaxDoseValue, CmaxDoseUnit, CmaxValueSources, RatioLowestPOD)



missedPositives = TopInVivo %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(BinaryDILIConsensus)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  arrange(RatioLowestPOD) %>%
  filter(RatioLowestPOD < 0.1) %>%
  filter(!BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe") %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
  select(-c(1:35)) %>%
  select(compoundName, DILIConcern, BinaryDILIConsensus, PODValues, PODValueSources,
         medianCmax, CmaxDoseValue, CmaxDoseUnit, CmaxValueSources, RatioLowestPOD)
```

#Ratio: LowestnonBSEPPOD (Obs Cmax)
```{r}
a = TopInVivo %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestnonBSEPPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  # filter(!PODValueSources == "medianBSEPIC50;") %>%
  arrange(RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(a$DILIConcern))
table(a$DILIConcern)



lowestnonBSEPPODForBoxplotComparison = a %>%
  select(DILIConcern, RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25)
```

##Bar
```{r}
ggplot(a, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(a, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = DILIRankBinary)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(a, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  scale_y_log10(
  breaks = c(0.0004, 0.04, 1, 40),
  labels = c("1e-04", "1e-02", "0.25", "1e+01")
) +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,210))

ggsave("figures/Ratio Lowest nonBSEP POD.pdf",  width = 180, height = 55, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

ggplot(a, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = DILIRankBinary)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()


ggplot(a, aes(x = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, y = numOfPODValues)) + geom_point(aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25)

```


##ROC (Wide)
```{r}
roc_objClinical = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernWide ~ RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD, data = a,
              levels = c("No", "Less-Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
plot(roc_objClinical, main = "ROC Curve", col = "blue", lwd = 2)



roc_dfWide <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(roc_objClinical$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(roc_objClinical$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)

ggplot(roc_dfWide, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr)) +
  geom_line(color = "black") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Wide Ratio LowestnonBSEPPOD ROC AUC.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



auc(roc_objClinical)
roc_coordsClinical = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "all",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsbest = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "best",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsPerfectSpecificity = coords(roc_objClinical, x = 1, input = "specificity",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

coords(roc_objClinical, x = 0.25, input = "threshold",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

```
##ROC (Narrow)
```{r}
roc_objClinical = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD, data = a,
              levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))

roc_dfNarrow <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(roc_objClinical$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(roc_objClinical$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)

ggplot(roc_dfNarrow, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr)) +
  geom_line(color = "black") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Narrow Ratio LowestnonBSEPPOD ROC AUC.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

auc(roc_objClinical)


auc(roc_objClinical)
roc_coordsClinical = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "all",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsbest = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "best",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsPerfectSpecificity = coords(roc_objClinical, x = 1, input = "specificity",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

coords(roc_objClinical, x = 0.25, input = "threshold",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
coords(roc_objClinical,
       x = 0.25,
       input = "threshold",
       ret = c("tp", "fp", "tn", "fn"))
roc_coordsbest
```


##ROC Wide vs Narrow
```{r}
roc_dfNarrow$type <- "Narrow"
roc_dfWide$type <- "Wide"


# Combine data frames into a single dataframe
roc_combined <- rbind(roc_dfNarrow, roc_dfWide)

ggplot(roc_combined, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr, colour = type)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Wide" = "blue",  "Narrow" = "black")) +
  geom_point(aes(x = 1-1, y= 0.5089286 ), color = "black", size = 2, shape = 4) 
  

ggsave("figures/Narrow vs Wide Ratio LowestnonBSEPPOD ROC AUC.pdf",  width = 47, height = 42, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```


##Boxplot
```{r}

ggplot(a, aes(x = RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD, fill = DILIConcern)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) + scale_x_log10(
  breaks = c(0.0004, 0.04, 1),
  labels = c("1e-04", "1e-02", "0.25")
) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Lowest POD (excl BSEP)"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
   # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


ggsave("figures/Ratio LowestnonBSEPPOD boxplot horizontal.pdf",  width = 45, height = 20, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```

```{r}
pairwise.wilcox.test(log10(a$RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD), a$DILIConcern, p.adjust.method = "holm")
```

##Cumulative Distribution
```{r}
ggplot(a, aes(x = RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1)+
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Ratio LowestnonBSEPPOD cumulative.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```



##Prob Distribution
```{r}
ggplot(a, aes(x = RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Ratio LowestnonBSEPPOD prob distribution.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(a, aes(x = RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD, fill = BinaryDILIConsensus)) + 
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red", "Safe" = "#00E300"))



aLessNonBSEP = a %>%
  filter(DILIConcern == "Less-DILI-Concern")

ggplot(aLessNonBSEP, aes(x = RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = 1, bins = 20) +  # Absolute counts
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",
    "Clinical Dev" = "darkred",
    "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange",
    "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",
    "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) 

nrow(aLessNonBSEP)


```

Compare less DILI concern with and without bsep

##Histogram Less-DILI incl and excl BSEP
```{r}
aLessNonBSEPMerg =  data.frame(Value = aLessNonBSEP$RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD, Source = "Excluding")
aLessWithBSEPMerg =  data.frame(Value = aLessWithBSEP$RatioLowestPOD, Source = "Including")

combined = rbind(aLessNonBSEPMerg, aLessWithBSEPMerg)

# combined$Source = factor(combined$Source, levels = c("Including", "Excluding"))

ggplot(combined, aes(x = Value, fill = Source)) + 
  geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = 0.5, bins = 20) +  # Absolute counts
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Excluding" = "blue",
    "Including" = "red"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD (incl/excl BSEP)"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) 


table(combined$Source)

```

```{r}
pairwise.wilcox.test(log10(a$RatioLowestPOD), a$DILIConcern, p.adjust.method = "holm")
```


##Cmax vs LowestNonBSEPPOD

```{r}
riskZone <- data.frame(
  x = c(1e-4, 1e-4, 5e1),
  y = c(5e-3, 1e3,  1e3)
)

safeZone <- data.frame(
  x = c(5e-2, 1e3, 1e3),
  y = c(1e-4, 1e-4,  5e0)
)


ggplot(a, aes(x = lowestnonBSEPPOD , y = medianCmax)) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = riskZone,
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    fill = "red",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = safeZone,
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    fill = "#00E300",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) + geom_point( aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_abline(slope = 1)+ scale_y_log10() + scale_x_log10() +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1e-4, 1000), ylim = c(1e-4, 1000))+ 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.1, linetype = "dashed")+
  labs(
    x = "Lowest POD [µM]",
    y = "Cmax [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + theme(legend.position = "none") + geom_point(data = data.frame(x = 0.25/1000, y = 20/1000), aes(x = x, y = y), color = "red", size = 3, shape = 4) 
  # geom_point(data = data.frame(x = 572.8, y = 2500), aes(x = x, y = y), color = "red", size = 3, shape = 4) +
  # geom_point(data = data.frame(x = 572.8, y = 137.1369), aes(x = x, y = y), color = "red", size = 3, shape = 4)
  

ggsave("figures/Cmax vs Lowest nonBSEP POD.pdf",  width = 70, height = 60, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```


##Boxplot Comparison incl excl BSEP

```{r}
lowestPODForBoxplotComparisonClean = lowestPODForBoxplotComparison %>%
  select(DILIConcern, value = RatioLowestPODBase0_25) %>%
  mutate(Source = "Including")

lowestnonBSEPPODForBoxplotComparisonClean = lowestnonBSEPPODForBoxplotComparison %>%
  select(DILIConcern, value = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25) %>%
  mutate(Source = "Excluding")

df_combined = bind_rows(lowestPODForBoxplotComparisonClean, lowestnonBSEPPODForBoxplotComparisonClean)

df_combined = df_combined %>%
  mutate(DILIConcern = as.character(DILIConcern)) %>%
  mutate(DILIConcern = ifelse(!is.na(DILIConcern) & DILIConcern == "No-DILI-Concern",
                              "No-DILI", DILIConcern)) %>%
  mutate(DILIConcern = ifelse(!is.na(DILIConcern) & DILIConcern == "Less-DILI-Concern",
                              "Less-DILI", DILIConcern)) %>%
  mutate(DILIConcern = ifelse(!is.na(DILIConcern) & DILIConcern == "Most-DILI-Concern",
                              "Most-DILI", DILIConcern))

df_combined$DILIConcern = factor(df_combined$DILIConcern, levels = c("No-DILI",
                                                                    "Less-DILI",
                                                                    "Most-DILI",
                                                                     "Clinical Dev"))

ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = DILIConcern, y = value, fill = Source)) +
  geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  labs(x = "DILI Concern", y = "Ratio") +
  labs(
    x = "DILIrank Class",
    y = "In vivo Cmax/POD ratio"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25))
 

ggsave("figures/Comparison Boxplot incl excl BSEP.pdf",  width = 85, height = 55, units = "mm", dpi = 600)
```


#Ratio: BSEP (Obs Cmax)
```{r}
c = TopInVivo %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern) & !is.na(medianBSEPIC50)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  arrange(RatioBSEP) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(c$DILIConcern))
table(c$DILIConcern)
```

##Bar
```{r}
ggplot(c, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioBSEP)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

cYMin = min(c$RatioBSEPBase0_25)
cYMax = max(c$RatioBSEPBase0_25) 

ggplot(c, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioBSEPBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  scale_y_log10(
  breaks = c(0.0004, 0.04, 1, 40),
  labels = c("1e-04", "1e-02", "0.25", "1e+01")
) +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,159), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax))

ggsave("figures/Ratio BSEP.pdf",  width = 180, height = 50, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(c, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioBSEPBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `expertDILIPattern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",   "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00", "hepatocellular" = "orange", "unknown" = "grey", "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()  +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,159), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax))

ggsave("figures/Ratio BSEP with expertDILIPattern.pdf",  width = 180, height = 55, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(c, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioBSEPBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity",  aes(fill = `CholestasisCombined`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1" = "blue",  "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00", "NA" = "grey",
                                    "0" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()  +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,159), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax))

ggsave("figures/Ratio BSEP with cholestasisCombined.pdf",  width = 180, height = 55, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(c, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioBSEPBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity",  aes(fill = `CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1" = "blue",  "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00", "NA" = "grey",
                                    "0" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()  +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,159), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax))

ggsave("figures/Ratio BSEP with KotsampasakouSIDERExpert.pdf",  width = 180, height = 55, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(c, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioBSEPBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity",  aes(fill = `cholestasisIntegrated`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",
                               "hepatocellular" = "orange",
                               "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00",
                               "unknown" = "grey",
                               "contradiction" = "pink" ,
                               "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()  +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,159), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax))

ggsave("figures/Ratio BSEP with cholestasisIntegrated.pdf",  width = 180, height = 55, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```

```{r}
ggplot(c, aes(x = CholestasisCombined, y = RatioBSEPBase0_25, fill = CholestasisCombined)) + geom_boxplot() + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1" = "blue",  "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00", "NA" = "grey",
                                    "0" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10()  +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  )

ggsave("figures/boxplot Ratio BSEP with cholestasisCombined.pdf",  width = 180, height = 55, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(c, aes(x = expertDILIPattern, y = RatioBSEPBase0_25, fill = expertDILIPattern)) + geom_boxplot() + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",  "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00", "hepatocellular" = "orange", "unknown" = "grey", "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10()  +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  )

ggsave("figures/boxplot Ratio BSEP with expertDILIPattern.pdf",  width = 180, height = 55, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(c, aes(x = CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert, y = RatioBSEPBase0_25, fill = CholestasisCombinedKotsampasakouSIDERExpert)) + geom_boxplot() + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1" = "blue",  "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00",
                               "NA" = "grey", "0" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10()  +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  )

ggsave("figures/boxplot Ratio BSEP with KotsampasakouSIDERExpert.pdf",  width = 180, height = 55, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(c, aes(x = cholestasisIntegrated, y = RatioBSEPBase0_25, fill = `cholestasisIntegrated`))+
    geom_boxplot() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",
                                 "hepatocellular" = "orange",
                                 "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00",
                                 "unknown" = "grey",
                                 "contradiction" = "pink" ,
                                 "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10()  +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  )

ggsave("figures/boxplot Ratio BSEP with cholestasisIntegrated.pdf",  width = 180, height = 55, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```


```{r}
c3 = c %>%
  arrange(RatioLowestPODBase0_25) %>%
  filter(!is.na(RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25)) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())


ggplot(c3, aes(x = rowID)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = rowID, 
                   y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, 
                   yend = RatioLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   colour = DILIConcern),
               # arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               linewidth = 1)  +
  geom_point(aes(x = rowID , y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, 
                   colour = DILIConcern), shape = 4) +
    geom_point(aes(x = rowID , y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25,
                   colour = DILIConcern), shape = 17) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+
  scale_y_log10(
  breaks = c(0.0004, 0.04, 1, 40),
  labels = c("1e-04", "1e-02", "0.25", "1e+01")
)   +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,139), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("figures/Ratio Arrows BSEP to lowestNon.pdf",  width = 130, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



c4 = c %>%
  filter(is.na(RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25)) %>%
  arrange(RatioBSEPBase0_25) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())


ggplot(c4, aes(x = rowID,  y = RatioBSEPBase0_25))  + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  scale_y_log10(
  breaks = c(0.0004, 0.04, 1, 40),
  labels = c("1e-04", "1e-02", "0.25", "1e+01")
)   +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,22), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("figures/Ratio only BSEP.pdf",  width = 45, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)




```

```{r}
selectedC = c %>%
  filter(RatioBSEPBase0_25 > 1) %>%
  filter(DILIConcern == "No-DILI-Concern") %>%
  select(-c(1:35)) %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
  select(compoundName, DILIConcern, BinaryDILIConsensus, PODValues, PODValueSources,
         medianCmax, CmaxDoseValue, CmaxDoseUnit, CmaxValueSources, RatioBSEP, RatioBSEPBase0_25)
```


```{r}
ggplot(c, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `expertDILIPattern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",  "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00", "hepatocellular" = "orange", "unknown" = "grey", "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10()


c3 = c %>%
  arrange(RatioLowestPODBase0_25) %>%
  filter(!is.na(RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25)) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())


ggplot(c3, aes(x = rowID)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = rowID, 
                   y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, 
                   yend = RatioLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   colour = expertDILIPattern),
               # arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               linewidth = 1)  +
  geom_point(aes(x = rowID , y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, 
                   colour = expertDILIPattern), shape = 4) +
    geom_point(aes(x = rowID , y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25,
                   colour = expertDILIPattern), shape = 17) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",   "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00", "hepatocellular" = "orange", "unknown" = "grey", "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()  +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,139), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("figures/Ratio Arrows BSEP to lowestNon with expertDILIpattern.pdf",  width = 130, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)




ggplot(c3, aes(x = rowID)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = rowID, 
                   y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, 
                   yend = RatioLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   colour = CholestasisCombined),
               # arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               linewidth = 1)  +
  geom_point(aes(x = rowID , y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, 
                   colour = CholestasisCombined), shape = 4) +
    geom_point(aes(x = rowID , y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25,
                   colour = CholestasisCombined), shape = 17) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("1" = "blue",  "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00", "NA" = "grey",
                                 "0" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()  +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,139), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("figures/Ratio Arrows BSEP to lowestNon with cholestasisCombined.pdf",  width = 130, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(c3, aes(x = rowID)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = rowID, 
                   y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, 
                   yend = RatioLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   colour = cholestasisIntegrated),
               # arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               linewidth = 1)  +
  geom_point(aes(x = rowID , y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, 
                   colour = cholestasisIntegrated), shape = 4) +
    geom_point(aes(x = rowID , y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25,
                   colour = cholestasisIntegrated), shape = 17) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",
                                 "hepatocellular" = "orange",
                                 "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00",
                                 "unknown" = "grey",
                                 "contradiction" = "pink" ,
                                 "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()  +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,139), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("figures/Ratio Arrows BSEP to lowestNon with cholestasisIntegrated.pdf",  width = 130, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)





c4 = c %>%
  filter(is.na(RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25)) %>%
  arrange(RatioBSEPBase0_25) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())


ggplot(c4, aes(x = rowID,  y = RatioBSEPBase0_25))  + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `expertDILIPattern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",  "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00",  "hepatocellular" = "orange", "unknown" = "grey", "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,22), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("figures/Ratio only BSEP with expertDILIPattern.pdf",  width = 45, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(c4, aes(x = rowID,  y = RatioBSEPBase0_25))  + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `CholestasisCombined`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1" = "blue",  "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00", "NA" = "grey",
                                    "0" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,22), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("figures/Ratio only BSEP with cholestasisCombined.pdf",  width = 45, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(c4, aes(x = rowID,  y = RatioBSEPBase0_25))  + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `cholestasisIntegrated`)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",
                                 "hepatocellular" = "orange",
                                 "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00",
                                 "unknown" = "grey",
                                 "contradiction" = "pink" ,
                                 "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,22), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("figures/Ratio only BSEP with cholestasisIntegrated.pdf",  width = 45, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)




```

```{r}
c3 = c3 %>%
  mutate(BSEPLift = RatioLowestPODBase0_25 / RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25) %>%
  arrange(BSEPLift) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

ggplot(c3, aes(x = rowID, y = BSEPLift)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `cholestasisIntegrated`)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",
                                 "hepatocellular" = "orange",
                                 "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00",
                                 "unknown" = "grey",
                                 "contradiction" = "pink" ,
                                 "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/BSEP IC50"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  # scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  # coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,22), ylim = c(cYMin, cYMax)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("figures/BSEPLift with cholestasisIntegrated.pdf",  width = 130, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```


##Cmax vs medianBSEPIC50
```{r}
ggplot(c, aes(x = medianBSEPIC50 , y = medianCmax)) + geom_point( aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_abline(slope = 1)+ scale_y_log10() + scale_x_log10() +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1e-4, 1000), ylim = c(1e-4, 1000))

```

```{r}
ggplot(c, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioBSEP)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = expertDILIPattern)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",  "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00", "hepatocellular" = "orange", "unknown" = "grey", "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10()


h = c %>%
  select(-c(1:35)) %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
  select(compoundName, DILIConcern, BinaryDILIConsensus, expertDILIPattern, PODValues, PODValueSources,
         medianCmax, CmaxDoseValue, CmaxDoseUnit, CmaxValueSources, RatioBSEP, RatioLowestPOD) %>%
  filter(RatioBSEP > 0.25)

```

##BSEP IC50 vs lowest non BSEP POD

```{r}
ggplot(c, aes(x = lowestnonBSEPPOD, y = medianBSEPIC50)) + geom_point( aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_abline(slope = 1)+ scale_y_log10() + scale_x_log10()
  # coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1e-1, 1000), ylim = c(1e-1, 1000))

```


#PBBA model

```{r}
c2 = TopInVivo %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern) & !is.na(medianBSEPIC50)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  arrange(SingleDay_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

ggplot(c2, aes(x = rowID, y = SingleDay_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(c2, aes(x = rowID, y = SingleDay_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()


ggplot(c2, aes(x = RatioPredBSEP, y = SingleDay_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange))  + geom_point(aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25)

ggplot(c2, aes(x = RatioPredBSEP, y = SingleDay_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove1_5fold)) + geom_point(aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  scale_x_log10()+ geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25)

ggplot(c2, aes(x = RatioPredBSEP, y = SingleDay_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold)) + geom_point(aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
   scale_x_log10()+ geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25)

```

```{r}
ggplot(c2, aes(x =  DILIConcern, y = SingleDay_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) + scale_y_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.8, 2.5))

ggplot(c2, aes(x =  DILIConcern, y = SingleDay_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange)) +
  geom_violin() + geom_point(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) + scale_y_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.8, 2.5))

```

```{r}
# ggplot(c2, aes(x = RatioPredBSEP, y = OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange))  + geom_point(aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
#   scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
#   scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25)
# 
# ggplot(c2, aes(x = RatioPredBSEP, y = OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove1_5fold)) + geom_point(aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
#   scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
#   scale_x_log10()+ geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25)
# 
# 
# ggplot(c2, aes(x = RatioPredBSEP, y = OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold_Hours)) + geom_point(aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
#   scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
#    scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, linetype = "dashed") +
#   theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
#   theme(
```
