```{r}
#     axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
#     axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
#     legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
#     legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
#     strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
#   ) +
#     scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_scientific()) +
#   ylab("Duration above two-fold [h]")
# 
# ggsave("figures/Ratio OneMonth Plasma AUC vs Predicted BSEP Ratio.pdf",  width = 95, height = 43, units = "mm", dpi = 600)
# 
# # ggplot(c2, aes(x = RatioPredBSEP, y = OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold)) + geom_point(aes(colour = `CholestasisCombined`)) +
# #   scale_colour_manual(values = c("1" = "red",  "0" = "#00E300", "NA" = "grey",
# #                                  "Mifepristone" = "darkred", "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00")) +
# #    scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, linetype = "dashed") +
# #   theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
# #   theme(
# #     axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
# #     axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
# #     legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
# #     legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
# #     strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
# #   ) +
# #   ylab("Duration above two-fold")
# # 
# # ggsave("figures/Ratio OneMonth Plasma AUC vs Predicted BSEP Ratio Cholestasis Labelled.pdf",  width = 80, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)
# 
# 
# 
# # ggplot(c2, aes(x = RatioPredBSEP, y = OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold_Hours)) + geom_point(aes(colour = `expertDILIPattern`)) +
# #   scale_colour_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",  "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00", "hepatocellular" = "orange", "unknown" = "grey", "safe" = "#00E300")) +
# #    scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, linetype = "dashed") +
# #   theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
# #   theme(
# #     axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
# #     axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
# #     legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
# #     legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
# #     strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
# #   ) +
# #     scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_scientific()) +
# #   ylab("Duration of Bile Acid elevation above two-fold [h]")
# # 
# 
# 
# 
# ggplot(c2, aes(x = RatioPredBSEP, y = OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold_Hours)) + geom_point(aes(colour = `cholestasisIntegrated`)) +
#     scale_colour_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",
#                                  "hepatocellular" = "orange",
#                                  "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00",
#                                  "unknown" = "grey",
#                                  "contradiction" = "pink" ,
#                                  "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
#    scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, linetype = "dashed") +
#   theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
#   theme(
#     axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
#     axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
#     legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
#     legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
#     strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
#   ) +
#     scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_scientific()) +
#   ylab("Duration of Bile Acid elevation above two-fold [h]")
# 
# ggsave("figures/Ratio OneMonth Plasma AUC vs PredictedBSEPRatio cholestasisIntegrated.pdf",  width = 95, height = 43, units = "mm", dpi = 600)
# 


ggplot(c2, aes(x = RatioPredBSEP, y = OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold_Hours)) +
geom_point(aes(colour = DILIConcern, shape = `cholestasisIntegrated`)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = 8,
                                 "hepatocellular" = 0,
                                 "Clinical Dev" = 16,
                                 "unknown" = 16,
                                 "contradiction" = 2,
                                 "safe" = 6)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
   scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_scientific()) +
  ylab("Duration of Bile Acid elevation above two-fold [h]")

ggsave("figures/Ratio OneMonth Plasma Duration vs PredictedBSEPRatio shape and colour.pdf",  width = 95, height = 43, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(c2, aes(x = RatioPredBSEP, y = OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove1_1Cmax_Hours)) +
geom_point(aes(colour = DILIConcern, shape = `cholestasisIntegrated`)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = 8,
                                 "hepatocellular" = 0,
                                 "Clinical Dev" = 16,
                                 "unknown" = 16,
                                 "contradiction" = 2,
                                 "safe" = 6)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
   scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_scientific()) +
  ylab("Duration 10% above physiological peak concentration [h]")

ggsave("figures/Ratio OneMonth 10 above physiological cmax vs PredictedBSEPRatio shape and colour.pdf",  width = 95, height = 43, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```

```{r}
ggplot(c2, aes(x = CholestasisCombined, y = OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange)) + geom_boxplot() +
  scale_y_log10()

ggplot(c2, aes(x = CholestasisCombined, y = RatioPredBSEP)) + geom_boxplot() + scale_y_log10()

ggplot(c2, aes(x = CholestasisCombined, y = RatioBSEP)) + geom_boxplot() + scale_y_log10()
```


```{r}
positivesFromPBBA = c2 %>%
  filter(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold > 100) %>%
  arrange(desc(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold)) %>%
  select(compoundID, compoundName, firstName, DILIConcern, cholestasisIntegrated, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold_Hours,
         OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove1_1Cmax_Hours,
         RatioPredBSEP, RatioBSEP, medianCmax, firstPlasmaCmax)

positivesFromPBBA$firstName

ratioUnderpredicts = c2 %>%
  filter(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold > 100 & RatioPredBSEP < 0.25) %>%
  arrange(desc(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold)) %>%
  select(compoundID, compoundName, firstName, DILIConcern, cholestasisIntegrated, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold_Hours,
         OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove1_1Cmax_Hours,
         RatioPredBSEP, RatioBSEP, medianCmax, firstPlasmaCmax)

ratioOverpredicts = c2 %>%
  filter(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold < 100 & RatioPredBSEP > 0.25) %>%
  arrange(desc(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold))  %>%
  select(compoundID, compoundName, firstName, DILIConcern, cholestasisIntegrated, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold_Hours,
         OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove1_1Cmax_Hours,
         RatioPredBSEP, RatioBSEP, medianCmax, firstPlasmaCmax)

ratioCorrectNegativePredicts = c2 %>%
  filter(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold < 100 & RatioPredBSEP < 0.25) %>%
  arrange(desc(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold)) %>%
  select(compoundID, compoundName, firstName, DILIConcern, cholestasisIntegrated, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold_Hours,
         OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove1_1Cmax_Hours,
         RatioPredBSEP, RatioBSEP, medianCmax, firstPlasmaCmax)

ratioCorrectPositivePredicts = c2 %>%
  filter(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold > 100 & RatioPredBSEP > 0.25) %>%
  arrange(desc(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold)) %>%
  select(compoundID, compoundName, firstName, DILIConcern, cholestasisIntegrated, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold_Hours,
         OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove1_1Cmax_Hours,
         RatioPredBSEP, RatioBSEP, medianCmax, firstPlasmaCmax)




BSEPSpecificCompoundsPBBA = c2 %>%
  filter(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold > 100) %>%
  filter(RatioBSEP > 0.5) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestnonBSEPPOD)) %>%
  filter(RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD < 0.5) %>%
  mutate(BSEPDistance = lowestnonBSEPPOD/medianBSEPIC50) %>%
  arrange(desc(BSEPDistance)) %>%
  arrange(desc(RatioBSEPBase0_25)) %>%
  # filter(BSEPDistance > 3) %>%
  select(compoundID, compoundName, firstName, DILIConcern, cholestasisIntegrated, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold,
         firstPlasmaCmax, medianCmax, medianBSEPIC50, lowestnonBSEPPOD, BSEPDistance, PODValues, PODValueSources,
         BSEPIC50Values, BSEPIC50ValueSources, RatioBSEP, RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD)




BSEPSpecificCompoundsPBBAWithoutNONBSEPPOD = c2 %>%
  filter(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold > 100) %>%
  filter(RatioBSEP > 0.5) %>%
  filter(is.na(lowestnonBSEPPOD)) %>%
  mutate(BSEPDistance = lowestnonBSEPPOD/medianBSEPIC50) %>%
  arrange(desc(BSEPDistance)) %>%
  arrange(desc(RatioBSEPBase0_25)) %>%
  select(compoundID, compoundName, firstName, DILIConcern, cholestasisIntegrated, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold,
         firstPlasmaCmax, medianCmax, medianBSEPIC50, lowestnonBSEPPOD, PODValues, PODValueSources,
         BSEPIC50Values, BSEPIC50ValueSources, RatioBSEP, RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD)


BSEPSpecificCompoundsRatio = TopInVivo %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestnonBSEPPOD)) %>%
  filter(RatioBSEP > 0.25) %>%
  mutate(BSEPDistance = lowestnonBSEPPOD/medianBSEPIC50) %>%
  filter(BSEPDistance > 10) %>%
  arrange(desc(RatioBSEPBase0_25)) %>%
  arrange(desc(BSEPDistance)) %>%
  select(compoundID, compoundName, firstName, DILIConcern, cholestasisIntegrated, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_AUCFoldChange, OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold,
         firstPlasmaCmax,  medianCmax, medianBSEPIC50, lowestnonBSEPPOD, BSEPDistance, PODValues, PODValueSources,
         BSEPIC50Values, BSEPIC50ValueSources, RatioBSEP)
```


```{r}
ggplot(c2, aes(x = RatioPredBSEP, y = OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove1_1Cmax)) + geom_point(aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
   scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  ylab("Duration Concentration 10% above previous Cmax")

ggsave("figures/Ratio OneMonth Cmax Above vs Predicted BSEP Ratio.pdf",  width = 95, height = 43, units = "mm", dpi = 600)





ggplot(c2, aes(x = RatioPredBSEP, y = OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove1_1Cmax)) + geom_point(aes(colour = `cholestasisIntegrated`)) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",
                                 "hepatocellular" = "orange",
                                 "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00",
                                 "unknown" = "grey",
                                 "contradiction" = "pink" ,
                                 "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
   scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 0.25, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  ylab("Duration Concentration 10% above previous Cmax")

ggsave("figures/Ratio OneMonth Cmax Above vs PredictedBSEPRatio cholestasisIntegrated.pdf",  width = 95, height = 43, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



```



#Ratio: LowestPOD (Pred Cmax InVivo)

```{r}
d = TopInVivo %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  arrange(RatioPredLowestPOD) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(d$DILIConcern))
table(d$DILIConcern)
```

##Bar
```{r}
ggplot(d, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPOD)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(d, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPOD)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = DILIRankBinary)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(d, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(d, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = DILIRankBinary)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

```
##ROC
```{r}
roc_objClinical = suppressMessages(roc(DILIRankBinary ~ RatioPredLowestPOD, data = d,
              levels = c("Safe", "Risk"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
plot(roc_objClinical, main = "ROC Curve", col = "blue", lwd = 2)
auc(roc_objClinical)
roc_coordsClinical = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "all",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsbest = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "best",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsPerfectSpecificity = coords(roc_objClinical, x = 1, input = "specificity",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

coords(roc_objClinical, x = 0.25, input = "threshold",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

```

##Boxplot
```{r}
ggplot(d, aes(x =  DILIConcern, y = RatioPredLowestPOD)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) + scale_y_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)



```

##Bar (DILIst)

```{r}
e = TopInVivo %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(BinaryDILIConsensus)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  arrange(RatioPredLowestPOD) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(e$BinaryDILIConsensus))
table(e$BinaryDILIConsensus)


ggplot(e, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPOD)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = BinaryDILIConsensus)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()


ggplot(e, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = BinaryDILIConsensus)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()
```

##ROC (DILIst)
```{r}
roc_objClinical = suppressMessages(roc(BinaryDILIConsensus ~ RatioPredLowestPOD, data = e,
              levels = c("Safe", "Risk"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
plot(roc_objClinical, main = "ROC Curve", col = "blue", lwd = 2)
auc(roc_objClinical)
roc_coordsClinical = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "all",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsbest = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "best",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsPerfectSpecificity = coords(roc_objClinical, x = 1, input = "specificity",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

coords(roc_objClinical, x = 0.25, input = "threshold",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

```


```{r}
l = TopInVivo %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  mutate(ObsCmaxClassCorrect = case_when(RatioLowestPODBase0_25 > 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk" ~ "Correct",
                                         RatioLowestPODBase0_25 > 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe" ~ "False",
                                         RatioLowestPODBase0_25 < 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk" ~ "False",
                                         RatioLowestPODBase0_25 < 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe" ~ "Correct"
                                         )) %>%
  mutate(PredCmaxClassCorrect = case_when(RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25 > 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk" ~ "Correct",
                                         RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25 > 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe" ~ "False",
                                         RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25 < 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk" ~ "False",
                                         RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25 < 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe" ~ "Correct"
                                         )) %>%
  mutate(ChangeDirectionClass = case_when(ObsCmaxClassCorrect == PredCmaxClassCorrect ~ "Neutral",
                                          ObsCmaxClassCorrect == "Correct" & PredCmaxClassCorrect == "False" ~ "Bad",
                                          ObsCmaxClassCorrect == "False" & PredCmaxClassCorrect == "Correct" ~ "Good",
                                         )) %>%
  arrange(RatioLowestPOD) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(l$DILIConcern))
table(l$DILIConcern)
```

##Bar (Change Cmax to InVivo CL)
```{r}

ggplot(l, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioLowestPOD)) + geom_point(aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
   geom_point(data = l, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPOD, colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10() +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) 


ggplot(l, aes(x = rowID)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = rowID, 
                   y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   yend = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   colour = DILIConcern),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               linewidth = 0.8) +
  # # Plot points for RatioLowestPOD
  # geom_point(aes(y = RatioLowestPOD, colour = DILIConcern), size = 2) +
  # # Plot points for RatioPredLowestPOD using a different shape
  # geom_point(aes(y = RatioPredLowestPOD, colour = DILIConcern), size = 2, shape = 17) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  
                                 "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", 
                                 "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", 
                                 "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  
                                 "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))


ggplot(l, aes(x = rowID)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = rowID, 
                   y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   yend = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   colour = ChangeDirectionClass),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               linewidth = 0.8) +
  # # Plot points for RatioLowestPOD
  # geom_point(aes(y = RatioLowestPOD, colour = DILIConcern), size = 2) +
  # # Plot points for RatioPredLowestPOD using a different shape
  # geom_point(aes(y = RatioPredLowestPOD, colour = DILIConcern), size = 2, shape = 17) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Neutral" = "grey",  
                                 "Bad" = "darkred", 
                                 "Good" = "#00E300"))


ggplot(l, aes(x = rowID)) +
  # Draw arrows with color mapped to ArrowGroup
  geom_segment(aes(xend = rowID, 
                   y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   yend = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   color = ChangeDirectionClass),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "ChangeDirectionClass", 
                     values = c("Neutral" = "grey",  
                                 "Bad" = "darkred", 
                                 "Good" = "#00E300")) +
  # Reset the color scale so that subsequent layers can have a different mapping
    new_scale_color() +
  # Draw points with color mapped to DILIConcern
  geom_point(aes(y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25, color = DILIConcern), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25, color = DILIConcern), size = 2, shape = 17) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "DILI Concern", 
                     values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  
                                "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", 
                                "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", 
                                "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  
                                "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  scale_y_log10()

```

#Ratio: BSEP (Pred Cmax In Vivo CL)
```{r}
f = TopInVivo %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern) & !is.na(medianBSEPIC50)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  arrange(RatioPredBSEP) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(f$DILIConcern))
table(f$DILIConcern)
```

##Bar
```{r}
ggplot(f, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredBSEP)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(f, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredBSEPBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10()
```

```{r}
ggplot(f, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredBSEP)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = expertDILIPattern)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",  "hepatocellular" = "orange",
                               "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00", "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

```


#Ratio: LowestPOD (Pred Cmax InSilico)

```{r}
d = TopInSilico %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  arrange(RatioPredLowestPOD) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(d$DILIConcern))
table(d$DILIConcern)
```

##Bar
```{r}
ggplot(d, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPOD)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(d, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPOD)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = DILIRankBinary)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()


ggplot(d, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,230))

ggsave("figures/Ratio InSilico Predicted Lowest POD.pdf",  width = 170, height = 60, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

ggplot(d, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = DILIRankBinary)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

```



##ROC (Wide)
```{r}
roc_objClinical = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernWide ~ RatioPredLowestPOD, data = d,
              levels = c("No", "Less-Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
plot(roc_objClinical, main = "ROC Curve", col = "blue", lwd = 2)



roc_dfWide <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(roc_objClinical$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(roc_objClinical$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)

ggplot(roc_dfWide, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr)) +
  geom_line(color = "black") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Wide Ratio InSilico Predicted LowestPOD ROC AUC.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



auc(roc_objClinical)
roc_coordsClinical = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "all",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsbest = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "best",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsPerfectSpecificity = coords(roc_objClinical, x = 1, input = "specificity",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

coords(roc_objClinical, x = 0.25, input = "threshold",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

```
##ROC (Narrow)
```{r}
roc_objClinical = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioPredLowestPOD, data = d,
              levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))

roc_dfNarrow <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(roc_objClinical$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(roc_objClinical$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)

ggplot(roc_dfNarrow, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr)) +
  geom_line(color = "black") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Narrow Ratio InSilico Pred LowestPOD ROC AUC.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


auc(roc_objClinical)
roc_coordsClinical = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "all",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsbest = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "best",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsPerfectSpecificity = coords(roc_objClinical, x = 1, input = "specificity",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

coords(roc_objClinical, x = 0.25, input = "threshold",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
roc_coordsbest
```


##ROC Wide vs Narrow
```{r}
roc_dfNarrow$type <- "Narrow"
roc_dfWide$type <- "Wide"


# Combine data frames into a single dataframe
roc_combined <- rbind(roc_dfNarrow, roc_dfWide)

ggplot(roc_combined, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr, colour = type)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Wide" = "blue",  "Narrow" = "black"))
  

ggsave("figures/Narrow vs Wide Ratio InSilico Pred LowestPOD ROC AUC.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```



##Boxplot
```{r}

ggplot(d, aes(x = RatioPredLowestPOD, fill = DILIConcern)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) + scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
   # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


ggsave("figures/Ratio InSilico Pred LowestPOD boxplot horizontal.pdf",  width = 45, height = 20, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```

##Cumulative Distribution
```{r}
ggplot(d, aes(x = RatioPredLowestPOD, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1)+
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Ratio InSilico Pred LowestPOD cumulative.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```

##Prob Distribution
```{r}
ggplot(d, aes(x = RatioPredLowestPOD, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Ratio InSilico Pred LowestPOD prob distribution.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```



##Bar (DILIst)

```{r}
e = TopInSilico %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(BinaryDILIConsensus)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  arrange(RatioPredLowestPOD) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(e$BinaryDILIConsensus))
table(e$BinaryDILIConsensus)


ggplot(e, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPOD)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = BinaryDILIConsensus)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()


ggplot(e, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = BinaryDILIConsensus)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()
```

##ROC (DILIst)
```{r}
roc_objClinical = suppressMessages(roc(BinaryDILIConsensus ~ RatioPredLowestPOD, data = e,
              levels = c("Safe", "Risk"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
plot(roc_objClinical, main = "ROC Curve", col = "blue", lwd = 2)
auc(roc_objClinical)
roc_coordsClinical = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "all",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsbest = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "best",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsPerfectSpecificity = coords(roc_objClinical, x = 1, input = "specificity",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

coords(roc_objClinical, x = 0.25, input = "threshold",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

```


```{r}
l = TopInSilico %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  mutate(ObsCmaxClassCorrect = case_when(RatioLowestPODBase0_25 > 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk" ~ "Correct",
                                         RatioLowestPODBase0_25 > 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe" ~ "False",
                                         RatioLowestPODBase0_25 < 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk" ~ "False",
                                         RatioLowestPODBase0_25 < 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe" ~ "Correct"
                                         )) %>%
  mutate(PredCmaxClassCorrect = case_when(RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25 > 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk" ~ "Correct",
                                         RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25 > 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe" ~ "False",
                                         RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25 < 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk" ~ "False",
                                         RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25 < 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe" ~ "Correct"
                                         )) %>%
  mutate(ChangeDirectionClass = case_when(ObsCmaxClassCorrect == PredCmaxClassCorrect ~ "Neutral",
                                          ObsCmaxClassCorrect == "Correct" & PredCmaxClassCorrect == "False" ~ "Bad",
                                          ObsCmaxClassCorrect == "False" & PredCmaxClassCorrect == "Correct" ~ "Good",
                                         )) %>%
  arrange(RatioPredLowestPOD) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(l$DILIConcern))
table(l$DILIConcern)
```

##Bar (Change Cmax to InSilico CL)
```{r}

ggplot(l, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPOD)) + geom_point(aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
   geom_point(data = l, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestPOD, colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10() +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) 


ggplot(l, aes(x = rowID)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = rowID, 
                   y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   yend = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   colour = DILIConcern),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               linewidth = 0.8) +
  # # Plot points for RatioLowestPOD
  # geom_point(aes(y = RatioLowestPOD, colour = DILIConcern), size = 2) +
  # # Plot points for RatioPredLowestPOD using a different shape
  # geom_point(aes(y = RatioPredLowestPOD, colour = DILIConcern), size = 2, shape = 17) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  
                                 "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", 
                                 "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", 
                                 "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  
                                 "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))


madePlot = ggplot(l, aes(x = rowID)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = rowID, 
                   y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   yend = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   colour = ChangeDirectionClass),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               linewidth = 0.8) +
  # # Plot points for RatioLowestPOD
  # geom_point(aes(y = RatioLowestPOD, colour = DILIConcern), size = 2) +
  # # Plot points for RatioPredLowestPOD using a different shape
  # geom_point(aes(y = RatioPredLowestPOD, colour = DILIConcern), size = 2, shape = 17) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Neutral" = "grey",  
                                 "Bad" = "#BA0000", 
                                 "Good" = "#2A9E00")) +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Predicted Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,230))
madePlot
ggsave("figures/Bar Change InSilico Predicted Lowest POD.pdf", madePlot,  width = 170, height = 50, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(l, aes(x = rowID)) +
  # Draw arrows with color mapped to ArrowGroup
  geom_segment(aes(xend = rowID, 
                   y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   yend = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25, 
                   color = ChangeDirectionClass),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "ChangeDirectionClass", 
                     values = c("Neutral" = "grey",  
                                 "Bad" = "darkred", 
                                 "Good" = "#2A9E00")) +
  # Reset the color scale so that subsequent layers can have a different mapping
    new_scale_color() +
  # Draw points with color mapped to DILIConcern
  geom_point(aes(y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25, color = DILIConcern), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = RatioPredLowestPODBase0_25, color = DILIConcern), size = 2, shape = 17) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "DILI Concern", 
                     values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  
                                "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", 
                                "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", 
                                "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  
                                "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  scale_y_log10()

```

```{r}
table(l$ChangeDirectionClass)
table(l$ChangeDirectionClass)/nrow(l)
```



#Ratio: LowestnonBSEPPOD (Pred Cmax InSilico)

```{r}
d2 = TopInSilico %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestnonBSEPPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  arrange(RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(d2$DILIConcern))
table(d2$DILIConcern)
```

##Bar
```{r}
ggplot(d2, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10(
  breaks = c(0.0004, 0.04, 1, 40),
  labels = c("1e-04", "1e-02", "0.25", "1e+01")
)  +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD (excl BSEP)"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,210))

ggsave("figures/Ratio InSilico Predicted LowestnonBSEPPOD.pdf",  width = 180, height = 55, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


```

##False Positives

```{r}
falsePositivesHTPBK = d2 %>%
  filter(RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25 > 1) %>%
  filter(DILIConcern == "No-DILI-Concern") %>%
  arrange(desc(RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25)) %>%
  # select(-c(1:35)) %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
  select(compoundName, DILIConcern, BinaryDILIConsensus, lowestnonBSEPPOD, PODValues, PODValueSources,
         firstPlasmaCmax, medianCmax, CmaxDoseValue, CmaxDoseUnit, CmaxValueSources, RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25)

```


##ROC (Wide)
```{r}
roc_objClinical = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernWide ~ RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD, data = d2,
              levels = c("No", "Less-Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
plot(roc_objClinical, main = "ROC Curve", col = "blue", lwd = 2)


roc_dfWide <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(roc_objClinical$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(roc_objClinical$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)

ggplot(roc_dfWide, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr)) +
  geom_line(color = "black") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Wide Ratio InSilico Predicted LowestnonBSEPPOD ROC AUC.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



auc(roc_objClinical)
roc_coordsClinical = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "all",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsbest = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "best",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsPerfectSpecificity = coords(roc_objClinical, x = 1, input = "specificity",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

coords(roc_objClinical, x = 0.25, input = "threshold",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

```
##ROC (Narrow)
```{r}
roc_objClinical = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD, data = d2,
              levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))

roc_dfNarrow <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(roc_objClinical$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(roc_objClinical$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)

ggplot(roc_dfNarrow, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr)) +
  geom_line(color = "black") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Narrow Ratio InSilico Pred LowestnonBSEPPOD ROC AUC.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


auc(roc_objClinical)
roc_coordsClinical = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "all",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsbest = coords(roc_objClinical, x = "best",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))
roc_coordsPerfectSpecificity = coords(roc_objClinical, x = 1, input = "specificity",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))

coords(roc_objClinical, x = 0.25, input = "threshold",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
roc_coordsbest
```


##ROC Wide vs Narrow
```{r}
roc_dfNarrow$type <- "Narrow"
roc_dfWide$type <- "Wide"


# Combine data frames into a single dataframe
roc_combined <- rbind(roc_dfNarrow, roc_dfWide)

ggplot(roc_combined, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr, colour = type)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Wide" = "blue",  "Narrow" = "black"))
  

ggsave("figures/Narrow vs Wide Ratio InSilico Pred LowestnonBSEPPOD ROC AUC.pdf",  width = 50, height = 45, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```

##Boxplot
```{r}
ggplot(d2, aes(x = RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD, fill = DILIConcern)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) + scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Lowest POD excl BSEP"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
   # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


ggsave("figures/Ratio InSilico Pred LowestnonBSEPPOD boxplot horizontal.pdf",  width = 42, height = 20, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```

```{r}
pairwise.wilcox.test(log10(d2$RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD), d2$DILIConcern, p.adjust.method = "holm")

```

##Cumulative Distribution
```{r}
ggplot(d2, aes(x = RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1)+
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Ratio InSilico Pred LowestnonBSEPPOD cumulative.pdf",  width = 42, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```

##Prob Distribution
```{r}
ggplot(d2, aes(x = RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Ratio Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

ggsave("figures/Ratio InSilico Pred LowestnonBSEPPOD prob distribution.pdf",  width = 42, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

```

```{r}
l2 = TopInSilico %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestnonBSEPPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  mutate(ObsCmaxClassCorrect = case_when(RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25 > 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk" ~ "Correct",
                                         RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25 > 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe" ~ "False",
                                         RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25 < 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk" ~ "False",
                                         RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25 < 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe" ~ "Correct"
                                         )) %>%
  mutate(PredCmaxClassCorrect = case_when(RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25 > 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk" ~ "Correct",
                                         RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25 > 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe" ~ "False",
                                         RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25 < 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk" ~ "False",
                                         RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25 < 1 & BinaryDILIConsensus == "Safe" ~ "Correct"
                                         )) %>%
  mutate(ChangeDirectionClass = case_when(ObsCmaxClassCorrect == PredCmaxClassCorrect ~ "Neutral",
                                          ObsCmaxClassCorrect == "Correct" & PredCmaxClassCorrect == "False" ~ "Bad",
                                          ObsCmaxClassCorrect == "False" & PredCmaxClassCorrect == "Correct" ~ "Good",
                                         )) %>%
  arrange(RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(l2$DILIConcern))
table(l2$DILIConcern)


l2$ChangeDirectionClass = factor(l2$ChangeDirectionClass, levels = c("Neutral", "Good", "Bad"))
l2 = l2 %>%                         # <- new object keeps your original intact
  arrange(match(ChangeDirectionClass,     # put Neutral rows first
                c("Neutral", "Good", "Bad")))

```

##Bar (Change Cmax to InSilico CL)
```{r}
ggplot(l2, aes(x = rowID)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = rowID, 
                   y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, 
                   yend = RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, 
                   colour = ChangeDirectionClass),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               linewidth = 0.8) +
  # # Plot points for RatioLowestPOD
  # geom_point(aes(y = RatioLowestPOD, colour = DILIConcern), size = 2) +
  # # Plot points for RatioPredLowestPOD using a different shape
  # geom_point(aes(y = RatioPredLowestPOD, colour = DILIConcern), size = 2, shape = 17) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  scale_y_log10(
  breaks = c(0.0004, 0.04, 1, 40),
  labels = c("1e-04", "1e-02", "0.25", "1e+01")
)  +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Neutral" = "grey",  
                                 "Bad" = "darkred", 
                                 "Good" = "#2A9E00")) +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs",
    y = "Ratio Predicted Cmax/Lowest POD"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1,210))

ggsave("figures/Bar Change InSilico Predicted LowestnonBSEP POD.pdf",  width = 180, height = 55, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(l2, aes(x = rowID)) +
  # Draw arrows with color mapped to ArrowGroup
  geom_segment(aes(xend = rowID, 
                   y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, 
                   yend = RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, 
                   color = ChangeDirectionClass),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "ChangeDirectionClass", 
                     values = c("Neutral" = "grey",  
                                 "Bad" = "darkred", 
                                 "Good" = "#2A9E00")) +
  # Reset the color scale so that subsequent layers can have a different mapping
    new_scale_color() +
  # Draw points with color mapped to DILIConcern
  geom_point(aes(y = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, color = DILIConcern), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, color = DILIConcern), size = 2, shape = 17) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "DILI Concern", 
                     values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  
                                "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", 
                                "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", 
                                "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  
                                "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  scale_y_log10(
  breaks = c(0.0004, 0.04, 1, 40),
  labels = c("1e-04", "1e-02", "0.25", "1e+01")
) 

```

```{r}
table(l2$ChangeDirectionClass)
table(l2$ChangeDirectionClass)/nrow(l2)
```


#Ratio: BSEP (Pred Cmax In Silico CL)
```{r}
f = TopInSilico %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern) & !is.na(medianBSEPIC50)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  arrange(RatioPredBSEP) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

sum(table(f$DILIConcern))
table(f$DILIConcern)
```

##Bar
```{r}
ggplot(f, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredBSEP)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(f, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredBSEPBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + scale_y_log10()
```

```{r}
ggplot(f, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioPredBSEP)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = expertDILIPattern)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("cholestatic" = "blue",  "hepatocellular" = "orange",
                               "Clinical Dev" = "#FFEA00", "safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

```


# Evaluate Assays

```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=2.5}
PODCols = c("Aleo2019CytoToxTHLEµM", "Aleo2019CytoToxHPG2µM", "Aleo2019MitoInhµM", "Aleo2019MitoUncµM",
            "Faes2024PODµM", "medianBSEPIC50", "CellPaintCytoToxPODµM",
            "ToxCastAPR_HepG2_CellLoss_24hr",
            "ToxCastAPR_HepG2_CellLoss_72hr",
            "ToxCastAPR_HepG2_MitoMass_24hr","ToxCastAPR_HepG2_MitoMass_72hr",
            "ToxCastAPR_HepG2_MitoMembPot_24hr", "ToxCastAPR_HepG2_MitoMembPot_72hr",
            # "CellPaintCellPaintPODµM",
            #"Aleo2019MDR3IC50µM",
            "Morgan2013MRP2IC50µM",
            "Albrecht2025EC10MaxµM",
            "terBraak2024lowestPODµM",
            "OBrien2006lowestPODµM",
            "Gustafsson2013lowestPODµM",
            "Persson2013lowestPODµM",
            "Schadt2015lowestPODµM",
            "Williams2019lowestPODµM",
            "Porceddu2012lowestPODµM",
            "Proctor2017lowestIC50")

output = data.frame(metric = NA, ROC_AUC = NA, sensitivity = NA, specificity = NA, threshold = NA,
                    numberOfCompounds = NA)

addRowTemplate = output

plotList = list()

for (metric in PODCols){
  
  currentMetric = TopInVivo %>%
    filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
    filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
    mutate(currentRatio =  medianCmax /!!sym(metric)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(currentRatio)) %>%
    arrange(currentRatio) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())
  
  
  metric = gsub("µM", "", metric)
  metric = gsub("lowestPOD", "", metric)
  metric = gsub("lowestIC50", "", metric)
  metric = gsub("EC10Max", "", metric)
  metric = gsub("IC50", "", metric)
  metric = gsub("APR_HepG2_", "", metric)
  metric = gsub("_", "", metric)
  metric = gsub("hr", "h", metric)
  
  
  plotMade = ggplot(currentMetric, aes(x = rowID, y = currentRatio*4)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_y_log10(
  breaks = c(0.0004, 0.04, 1, 40),
  labels = c("1e-04", "1e-02", "0.25", "1e+01")
) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  labs(
    x = "Drugs"
  ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1) + ggtitle(metric) +
    theme_linedraw(base_size = 7) +
    ylab("Ratio Cmax/Activity")
  
  print(plotMade)
  plotMade = plotMade + theme(legend.position = "none")
  plotList[[length(plotList) + 1]] = plotMade

  
  
  addRow = addRowTemplate
  addRow$metric = metric
  addRow$numberOfCompounds = nrow(currentMetric)
  
  allSame = currentMetric %>%
    summarise(all_same = n_distinct(BinaryDILIConsensus) == 1)
  
  if (!allSame){
  roc_obj = suppressMessages(roc(BinaryDILIConsensus ~ currentRatio, data = currentMetric,
              levels = c("Safe", "Risk"), quiet = T, na.rm = T))

  addRow$ROC_AUC = auc(roc_obj)
  
  coordsValues = coords(roc_obj,
                            "best",
                            #x = 0.9 , input = "specificity",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
  
  addRow$sensitivity = coordsValues$sensitivity
  addRow$specificity = coordsValues$specificity
  addRow$threshold = coordsValues$threshold
    
  }
  
  
  output = rbind(output, addRow)
  
  # ggplot(currentMetric, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = DILIRankBinary)) +
  #   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  #   geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

}
plotList_grob = lapply(plotList, ggplotGrob)
combined_plot = wrap_plots(plotList_grob, ncol = 4)
#print(combined_plot)

ggsave("figures/assays.pdf", combined_plot, dpi = 600, width = 180, height = 180,
       units = "mm")

output = output[-1,]
```


#Performance Metrics Table

##1
```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilico %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")


roc_objLogP = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ ADMETLab_logP, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLogP = auc(roc_objLogP)
coordsLogP = coords(roc_objLogP, x = 3, input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLogP = (coordsLogP$sensitivity + coordsLogP$specificity)/2
coordsLogP$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLogP
coordsLogP$AUC = AUCLogP
coordsLogP = signif(coordsLogP, 3)
coordsLogP



roc_objDose = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ CmaxDoseValue, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCDose = auc(roc_objDose)
coordsDose = coords(roc_objDose, x = 100, input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuDose = (coordsDose$sensitivity + coordsDose$specificity)/2
coordsDose$balancedAccuracy = balAccuDose
coordsDose$AUC = AUCDose
coordsDose = signif(coordsDose, 3)
coordsDose



roc_objCmax = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ medianCmax, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCCmax = auc(roc_objCmax)
coordsCmax = coords(roc_objCmax, x = 1.1, input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuCmax = (coordsCmax$sensitivity + coordsCmax$specificity)/2
coordsCmax$balancedAccuracy = balAccuCmax
coordsCmax$AUC = AUCCmax
coordsCmax = signif(coordsCmax, 3)
coordsCmax



roc_objPredCmax = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ firstPlasmaCmax, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCPredCmax = auc(roc_objPredCmax)
coordsPredCmax = coords(roc_objPredCmax, x = 1.1, input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuPredCmax = (coordsPredCmax$sensitivity + coordsPredCmax$specificity)/2
coordsPredCmax$balancedAccuracy = balAccuPredCmax
coordsPredCmax$AUC = AUCPredCmax
coordsPredCmax = signif(coordsPredCmax, 3)
coordsPredCmax
```
##2a

```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilico %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD))



roc_objLowestNonBSEP = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestNonBSEP = auc(roc_objLowestNonBSEP)
coordsLowestNonBSEP = coords(roc_objLowestNonBSEP, x = 0.25 , input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestNonBSEP = (coordsLowestNonBSEP$sensitivity + coordsLowestNonBSEP$specificity)/2
coordsLowestNonBSEP$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP$AUC = AUCLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP = signif(coordsLowestNonBSEP, 3)
coordsLowestNonBSEP


roc_objLowestNonBSEP = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestNonBSEP = auc(roc_objLowestNonBSEP)
coordsLowestNonBSEP = coords(roc_objLowestNonBSEP, x = "best" ,
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestNonBSEP = (coordsLowestNonBSEP$sensitivity + coordsLowestNonBSEP$specificity)/2
coordsLowestNonBSEP$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP$AUC = AUCLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP = signif(coordsLowestNonBSEP, 3)
coordsLowestNonBSEP
```

##2b
```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilico %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(RatioLowestPOD))



roc_objLowestAny = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioLowestPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestAny = auc(roc_objLowestAny)
coordsLowestAny = coords(roc_objLowestAny, x = 0.25 , input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestAny = (coordsLowestAny$sensitivity + coordsLowestAny$specificity)/2
coordsLowestAny$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestAny
coordsLowestAny$AUC = AUCLowestAny
coordsLowestAny = signif(coordsLowestAny, 3)
coordsLowestAny


roc_objLowestAny = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioLowestPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestAny = auc(roc_objLowestAny)
coordsLowestAny = coords(roc_objLowestAny, x = "best" ,
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestAny = (coordsLowestAny$sensitivity + coordsLowestAny$specificity)/2
coordsLowestAny$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestAny
coordsLowestAny$AUC = AUCLowestAny
coordsLowestAny = signif(coordsLowestAny, 3)
coordsLowestAny
```

##3a
```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilico %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD))



roc_objLowestNonBSEP = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestNonBSEP = auc(roc_objLowestNonBSEP)
coordsLowestNonBSEP = coords(roc_objLowestNonBSEP, x = 0.25 , input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestNonBSEP = (coordsLowestNonBSEP$sensitivity + coordsLowestNonBSEP$specificity)/2
coordsLowestNonBSEP$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP$AUC = AUCLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP = signif(coordsLowestNonBSEP, 3)
coordsLowestNonBSEP


roc_objLowestNonBSEP = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestNonBSEP = auc(roc_objLowestNonBSEP)
coordsLowestNonBSEP = coords(roc_objLowestNonBSEP, x = "best" ,
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestNonBSEP = (coordsLowestNonBSEP$sensitivity + coordsLowestNonBSEP$specificity)/2
coordsLowestNonBSEP$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP$AUC = AUCLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP = signif(coordsLowestNonBSEP, 3)
coordsLowestNonBSEP
```

##3b
```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilico %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(RatioLowestPOD))



roc_objLowestAny = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioPredLowestPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestAny = auc(roc_objLowestAny)
coordsLowestAny = coords(roc_objLowestAny, x = 0.25 , input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestAny = (coordsLowestAny$sensitivity + coordsLowestAny$specificity)/2
coordsLowestAny$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestAny
coordsLowestAny$AUC = AUCLowestAny
coordsLowestAny = signif(coordsLowestAny, 3)
coordsLowestAny


roc_objLowestAny = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioPredLowestPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestAny = auc(roc_objLowestAny)
coordsLowestAny = coords(roc_objLowestAny, x = "best" ,
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestAny = (coordsLowestAny$sensitivity + coordsLowestAny$specificity)/2
coordsLowestAny$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestAny
coordsLowestAny$AUC = AUCLowestAny
coordsLowestAny = signif(coordsLowestAny, 3)
coordsLowestAny
```


##4
```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilico %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(RatioBSEP))



roc_objLowestAny = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioBSEP, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestAny = auc(roc_objLowestAny)
coordsLowestAny = coords(roc_objLowestAny, x = 0.25 , input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestAny = (coordsLowestAny$sensitivity + coordsLowestAny$specificity)/2
coordsLowestAny$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestAny
coordsLowestAny$AUC = AUCLowestAny
coordsLowestAny = signif(coordsLowestAny, 3)
coordsLowestAny


roc_objLowestAny = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioBSEP, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestAny = auc(roc_objLowestAny)
coordsLowestAny = coords(roc_objLowestAny, x = "best" ,
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestAny = (coordsLowestAny$sensitivity + coordsLowestAny$specificity)/2
coordsLowestAny$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestAny
coordsLowestAny$AUC = AUCLowestAny
coordsLowestAny = signif(coordsLowestAny, 3)
coordsLowestAny
```



##1 (Mifepristone Primidone adapted)
```{r}
TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted = TopInSilico
TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted$DILIConcernNarrow[TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted$firstName == "Primidone"] = "Yes"
TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted$DILIConcernNarrow[TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted$firstName == "MIFEPRISTONE"] = "Yes"
  
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")


roc_objLogP = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ ADMETLab_logP, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLogP = auc(roc_objLogP)
coordsLogP = coords(roc_objLogP, x = 3, input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLogP = (coordsLogP$sensitivity + coordsLogP$specificity)/2
coordsLogP$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLogP
coordsLogP$AUC = AUCLogP
coordsLogP = signif(coordsLogP, 3)
coordsLogP



roc_objDose = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ CmaxDoseValue, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCDose = auc(roc_objDose)
coordsDose = coords(roc_objDose, x = 100, input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuDose = (coordsDose$sensitivity + coordsDose$specificity)/2
coordsDose$balancedAccuracy = balAccuDose
coordsDose$AUC = AUCDose
coordsDose = signif(coordsDose, 3)
coordsDose



roc_objCmax = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ medianCmax, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCCmax = auc(roc_objCmax)
coordsCmax = coords(roc_objCmax, x = 1.1, input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuCmax = (coordsCmax$sensitivity + coordsCmax$specificity)/2
coordsCmax$balancedAccuracy = balAccuCmax
coordsCmax$AUC = AUCCmax
coordsCmax = signif(coordsCmax, 3)
coordsCmax



roc_objPredCmax = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ firstPlasmaCmax, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCPredCmax = auc(roc_objPredCmax)
coordsPredCmax = coords(roc_objPredCmax, x = 1.1, input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuPredCmax = (coordsPredCmax$sensitivity + coordsPredCmax$specificity)/2
coordsPredCmax$balancedAccuracy = balAccuPredCmax
coordsPredCmax$AUC = AUCPredCmax
coordsPredCmax = signif(coordsPredCmax, 3)
coordsPredCmax
```

```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))

miscDistributionsANarrow = TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP >= 3) %>%
  filter(CmaxDoseValue >= 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))

# table(miscDistributionsANarrow$DILIConcernNarrow) / table(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow)

miscDistributionsBNarrow = TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP < 3) %>%
  filter(CmaxDoseValue >= 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))

# table(miscDistributionsBNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow) / table(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow)

miscDistributionsCNarrow = TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP >= 3) %>%
  filter(CmaxDoseValue < 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))

# table(miscDistributionsCNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow) / table(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow)


miscDistributionsDNarrow = TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP < 3) %>%
  filter(CmaxDoseValue < 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))

# table(miscDistributionsDNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow) / table(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow)


miscDistributionsNonANarrow = TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP < 3 | CmaxDoseValue < 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))

# table(miscDistributionsNonANarrow$DILIConcernNarrow) / table(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernNarrow)


print("narrow")
#Sensitivity
Sensitivity = sum(miscDistributionsANarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "Most-Clinical") / sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "Most-Clinical" )
paste("Sens:", Sensitivity)


#Specificity
Specificity = (sum(miscDistributionsNonANarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "No") /  sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "No"))
paste("Spec:", Specificity)


(Sensitivity+Specificity)/2
```


##2a (Mifepristone Primidone adapted)

```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD))



roc_objLowestNonBSEP = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestNonBSEP = auc(roc_objLowestNonBSEP)
coordsLowestNonBSEP = coords(roc_objLowestNonBSEP, x = 0.25 , input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestNonBSEP = (coordsLowestNonBSEP$sensitivity + coordsLowestNonBSEP$specificity)/2
coordsLowestNonBSEP$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP$AUC = AUCLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP = signif(coordsLowestNonBSEP, 3)
coordsLowestNonBSEP


roc_objLowestNonBSEP = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestNonBSEP = auc(roc_objLowestNonBSEP)
coordsLowestNonBSEP = coords(roc_objLowestNonBSEP, x = "best" ,
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestNonBSEP = (coordsLowestNonBSEP$sensitivity + coordsLowestNonBSEP$specificity)/2
coordsLowestNonBSEP$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP$AUC = AUCLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP = signif(coordsLowestNonBSEP, 3)
coordsLowestNonBSEP
```

##2b (Mifepristone Primidone adapted)
```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(RatioLowestPOD))



roc_objLowestAny = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioLowestPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestAny = auc(roc_objLowestAny)
coordsLowestAny = coords(roc_objLowestAny, x = 0.25 , input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestAny = (coordsLowestAny$sensitivity + coordsLowestAny$specificity)/2
coordsLowestAny$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestAny
coordsLowestAny$AUC = AUCLowestAny
coordsLowestAny = signif(coordsLowestAny, 3)
coordsLowestAny


roc_objLowestAny = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioLowestPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestAny = auc(roc_objLowestAny)
coordsLowestAny = coords(roc_objLowestAny, x = "best" ,
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestAny = (coordsLowestAny$sensitivity + coordsLowestAny$specificity)/2
coordsLowestAny$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestAny
coordsLowestAny$AUC = AUCLowestAny
coordsLowestAny = signif(coordsLowestAny, 3)
coordsLowestAny
```

##3a (Mifepristone Primidone adapted)
```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(RatioLowestnonBSEPPOD))



roc_objLowestNonBSEP = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestNonBSEP = auc(roc_objLowestNonBSEP)
coordsLowestNonBSEP = coords(roc_objLowestNonBSEP, x = 0.25 , input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestNonBSEP = (coordsLowestNonBSEP$sensitivity + coordsLowestNonBSEP$specificity)/2
coordsLowestNonBSEP$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP$AUC = AUCLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP = signif(coordsLowestNonBSEP, 3)
coordsLowestNonBSEP


roc_objLowestNonBSEP = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioPredLowestnonBSEPPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestNonBSEP = auc(roc_objLowestNonBSEP)
coordsLowestNonBSEP = coords(roc_objLowestNonBSEP, x = "best" ,
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestNonBSEP = (coordsLowestNonBSEP$sensitivity + coordsLowestNonBSEP$specificity)/2
coordsLowestNonBSEP$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP$AUC = AUCLowestNonBSEP
coordsLowestNonBSEP = signif(coordsLowestNonBSEP, 3)
coordsLowestNonBSEP
```

##3b (Mifepristone Primidone adapted)
```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(RatioLowestPOD))



roc_objLowestAny = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioPredLowestPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestAny = auc(roc_objLowestAny)
coordsLowestAny = coords(roc_objLowestAny, x = 0.25 , input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestAny = (coordsLowestAny$sensitivity + coordsLowestAny$specificity)/2
coordsLowestAny$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestAny
coordsLowestAny$AUC = AUCLowestAny
coordsLowestAny = signif(coordsLowestAny, 3)
coordsLowestAny


roc_objLowestAny = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioPredLowestPOD, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestAny = auc(roc_objLowestAny)
coordsLowestAny = coords(roc_objLowestAny, x = "best" ,
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestAny = (coordsLowestAny$sensitivity + coordsLowestAny$specificity)/2
coordsLowestAny$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestAny
coordsLowestAny$AUC = AUCLowestAny
coordsLowestAny = signif(coordsLowestAny, 3)
coordsLowestAny
```


##4 (Mifepristone Primidone adapted)
