```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(RatioBSEP))



roc_objLowestAny = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioBSEP, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestAny = auc(roc_objLowestAny)
coordsLowestAny = coords(roc_objLowestAny, x = 0.25 , input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestAny = (coordsLowestAny$sensitivity + coordsLowestAny$specificity)/2
coordsLowestAny$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestAny
coordsLowestAny$AUC = AUCLowestAny
coordsLowestAny = signif(coordsLowestAny, 3)
coordsLowestAny


roc_objLowestAny = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ RatioBSEP, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCLowestAny = auc(roc_objLowestAny)
coordsLowestAny = coords(roc_objLowestAny, x = "best" ,
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuLowestAny = (coordsLowestAny$sensitivity + coordsLowestAny$specificity)/2
coordsLowestAny$balancedAccuracy = balAccuLowestAny
coordsLowestAny$AUC = AUCLowestAny
coordsLowestAny = signif(coordsLowestAny, 3)
coordsLowestAny
```



##5 (Mifepristone Primidone adapted)
```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = TopInSilicoMifePrimiAdapted %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern") %>%
  filter(!is.na(OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold))


roc_objPBBA = roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ OneMonth_InVivoCL_Plasma_DurationAbove_2fold, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
                                       levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T)
AUCPBBA = auc(roc_objPBBA)
coordsPBBA = coords(roc_objPBBA, x = 100 , input = "threshold",
       ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
balAccuPBBA = (coordsPBBA$sensitivity + coordsPBBA$specificity)/2
coordsPBBA$balancedAccuracy = balAccuPBBA
coordsPBBA$AUC = AUCPBBA
coordsPBBA = signif(coordsPBBA, 3)
coordsPBBA


```



#Misc

##Dose/Cmax/Lipo (plots)
```{r}
miscDistributions = TopInVivo %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")


miscDistributions$DILIConcern = factor(miscDistributions$DILIConcern, levels = c("No-DILI-Concern","Less-DILI-Concern", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern",  "Clinical Dev",  "Most-DILI-Concern"))

# ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = medianCmax, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
#   geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
#   scale_x_log10() +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))
# 
# ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x =  DILIConcern, y = medianCmax)) +
#   geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) + scale_y_log10() +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))
# 
# ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = CmaxDoseValue, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
#   geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
#   scale_x_log10() +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange",  "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))
# 
# ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x =  DILIConcern, y = CmaxDoseValue)) +
#   geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) + scale_y_log10() +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))
# 
# ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = ADMETLab_logD, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
#   geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange","Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))
# 
# ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x =  DILIConcern, y = ADMETLab_logD)) +
#   geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) + scale_y_log10() +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))
# 

#logP

logPMin = min(miscDistributions$ADMETLab_logP)
logPMax = max(miscDistributions$ADMETLab_logP)
ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = ADMETLab_logP, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange","Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "LogP"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 3, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(logPMin - 0.2, logPMax + 0.2))

ggsave("figures/logP DILIrank prob distribution.pdf",  width = 40, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

# ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x =  DILIConcern, y = ADMETLab_logP)) +
#   geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) + scale_y_log10() +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
#   labs(
#     x = "logP"
#   ) +
#   theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
#   theme(
#     axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
#     axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
#     legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
#     legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
#     strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
#   ) +
#    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
#   theme(legend.position = "none") +
#   scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
#     "Most-DILI-Concern" = "Most",
#     "Clinical Dev" = "Clinical Dev",
#     "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "Ambiguous",
#     "Less-DILI-Concern" = "Less",
#     "No-DILI-Concern" = "No"
#   ))
# 
# 
# ggsave("figures/logP DILIrank boxplot.pdf",  width = 40, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = ADMETLab_logP, fill = DILIConcern)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "logP"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
   # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 3, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(logPMin - 0.2, logPMax + 0.2))


ggsave("figures/logP DILIrank boxplot horizontal.pdf",  width = 40, height = 23, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = ADMETLab_logP, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "logP"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 3, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(logPMin - 0.2, logPMax + 0.2))


ggsave("figures/logP DILIrank cumulative.pdf",  width = 40, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



#------

doseMin = min(miscDistributions$CmaxDoseValue)
doseMax = max(miscDistributions$CmaxDoseValue)

#dose
ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = CmaxDoseValue, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange","Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Dose [mg]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_log10()+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed")   +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(doseMin * 0.9, doseMax * 1.1))


ggsave("figures/dose DILIrank prob distribution.pdf",  width = 40, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

# ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = DILIConcern, y = CmaxDoseValue)) +
#   geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) + scale_y_log10() +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
#   labs(
#     x = "Dose [mg]"
#   ) +
#   theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
#   theme(
#     axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
#     axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
#     legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
#     legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
#     strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
#   ) +
#    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
#   theme(legend.position = "none") +
#   scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
#     "Most-DILI-Concern" = "Most",
#     "Clinical Dev" = "Clinical Dev",
#     "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "Ambiguous",
#     "Less-DILI-Concern" = "Less",
#     "No-DILI-Concern" = "No"
#   ))+
#   scale_y_log10()
# 
# 
# ggsave("figures/dose DILIrank boxplot.pdf",  width = 50, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)
# 



ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = CmaxDoseValue, fill = DILIConcern)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Dose [mg]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
   # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(doseMin * 0.9, doseMax * 1.1))




ggsave("figures/dose DILIrank boxplot horizontal.pdf",  width = 40, height = 23, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = CmaxDoseValue, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Dose [mg]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed")  +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(doseMin * 0.9, doseMax * 1.1))




ggsave("figures/dose DILIrank cumulative.pdf",  width = 40, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

#------


cmaxMin = min(miscDistributions$medianCmax)
cmaxMax = max(miscDistributions$medianCmax)


#Cmax
ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = medianCmax, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange","Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Cmax [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1.1, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(cmaxMin * 0.9, cmaxMax * 1.1))

ggsave("figures/Cmax DILIrank prob distribution.pdf",  width = 40, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

# ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x =  DILIConcern, y = medianCmax)) +
#   geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) + scale_y_log10() +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
#   labs(
#     x = "Cmax [µM]"
#   ) +
#   theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
#   theme(
#     axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
#     axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
#     legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
#     legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
#     strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
#   ) +
#    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
#   theme(legend.position = "none") +
#   scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
#     "Most-DILI-Concern" = "Most",
#     "Clinical Dev" = "Clinical Dev",
#     "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "Ambiguous",
#     "Less-DILI-Concern" = "Less",
#     "No-DILI-Concern" = "No"
#   ))+
#   scale_y_log10() 
# 
# 
# ggsave("figures/cmax DILIrank boxplot.pdf",  width = 50, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)
# 
# 


ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = medianCmax, fill = DILIConcern)) +
  geom_boxplot() + scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Cmax [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
   # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1.1, linetype = "dashed")+
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(cmaxMin * 0.9, cmaxMax * 1.1))


ggsave("figures/Cmax DILIrank boxplot horizontal.pdf",  width = 40, height = 23, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = medianCmax, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Cmax [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1.1, linetype = "dashed")+
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(cmaxMin * 0.9, cmaxMax * 1.1))


ggsave("figures/cmax DILIrank cumulative.pdf",  width = 40, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



#------

```

##Statist Signif of LogP/Dose/Cmax
```{r}
library(car)
```


logP

```{r}
pairwise.wilcox.test(miscDistributions$ADMETLab_logP, miscDistributions$DILIConcern, p.adjust.method = "holm")
```


Dose
```{r}
miscDistributions$logCmaxDoseValue = log10(miscDistributions$CmaxDoseValue)
```


```{r}
pairwise.wilcox.test(miscDistributions$logCmaxDoseValue, miscDistributions$DILIConcern, p.adjust.method = "holm")
```


Cmax
```{r}
miscDistributions$logMedianCmax = log10(miscDistributions$medianCmax)
```

```{r}
pairwise.wilcox.test(miscDistributions$logMedianCmax, miscDistributions$DILIConcern, p.adjust.method = "holm")
```

##Sens/Spec of LogP/Dose/Cmax
```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))
  
  
miscDistributionsWide = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernWide))

#------
print("wide")
print("logP")
#Sensitivity
Sensitivity = sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "Less-Most-Clinical" &
                    miscDistributionsWide$ADMETLab_logP >= 3) / sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "Less-Most-Clinical" )
paste("Sens:", Sensitivity)


#Specificity
Specificity = (sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "No"&
                    miscDistributionsWide$ADMETLab_logP < 3) /  sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "No"))
paste("Spec:", Specificity)



print("Dose")
#Sensitivity
Sensitivity = sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "Less-Most-Clinical" &
                    miscDistributionsWide$CmaxDoseValue >= 100) / sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "Less-Most-Clinical" )
paste("Sens:", Sensitivity)

#Specificity
Specificity = (sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "No"&
                    miscDistributionsWide$CmaxDoseValue < 100) /  sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "No"))
paste("Spec:", Specificity)


print("Cmax")
#Sensitivity
Sensitivity = sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "Less-Most-Clinical" &
                    miscDistributionsWide$medianCmax >= 1.1) / sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "Less-Most-Clinical" )
paste("Sens:", Sensitivity)


#Specificity
Specificity = (sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "No"&
                    miscDistributionsWide$medianCmax < 1.1) /  sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "No"))
paste("Spec:", Specificity)

#---





print("narrow")
print("logP")
#Sensitivity
Sensitivity = sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "Most-Clinical" &
                    miscDistributionsNarrow$ADMETLab_logP >= 3) / sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "Most-Clinical" )
paste("Sens:", Sensitivity)


#Specificity
Specificity = (sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "No"&
                    miscDistributionsNarrow$ADMETLab_logP < 3) /  sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "No"))
paste("Spec:", Specificity)



print("Dose")
#Sensitivity
Sensitivity = sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "Most-Clinical" &
                    miscDistributionsNarrow$CmaxDoseValue >= 100) / sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "Most-Clinical" )
paste("Sens:", Sensitivity)

#Specificity
Specificity = (sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "No"&
                    miscDistributionsNarrow$CmaxDoseValue < 100) /  sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "No"))
paste("Spec:", Specificity)


print("Cmax")
#Sensitivity
Sensitivity = sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "Most-Clinical" &
                    miscDistributionsNarrow$medianCmax >= 1.1) / sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "Most-Clinical" )
paste("Sens:", Sensitivity)


#Specificity
Specificity = (sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "No"&
                    miscDistributionsNarrow$medianCmax < 1.1) /  sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "No"))
paste("Spec:", Specificity)


```


##Cyto/Mito/BSEP (plots)
```{r}
miscDistributionsCytoTox = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestCytoTox))

miscDistributionsMitoTox = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestMitoTox))

miscDistributionsBSEP = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianBSEPIC50))


#Cytotox
ggplot(miscDistributionsCytoTox, aes(x = lowestCytoTox, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange","Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Cytotoxicity [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_log10()

ggsave("figures/cytotox prob distribution.pdf",  width = 50, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(miscDistributionsCytoTox, aes(x = lowestCytoTox, fill = DILIConcern)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Cytotoxicity [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_log10()


ggsave("figures/cytotox DILIrank boxplot horizontal.pdf",  width = 50, height = 23, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(miscDistributionsCytoTox, aes(x = lowestCytoTox, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Cytotoxicity [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


ggsave("figures/cytotox DILIrank cumulative.pdf",  width = 50, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



#------




#MitoTox
ggplot(miscDistributionsMitoTox, aes(x = lowestMitoTox, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange","Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Mitotoxicity [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_log10()

ggsave("figures/mitotox DILIrank prob distribution.pdf",  width = 50, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)




ggplot(miscDistributionsMitoTox, aes(x = lowestMitoTox, fill = DILIConcern)) +
  geom_boxplot() + scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Mitotoxicity [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


ggsave("figures/mitotox DILIrank boxplot horizontal.pdf",  width = 50, height = 23, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(miscDistributionsMitoTox, aes(x = lowestMitoTox, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Mitotoxicity [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


ggsave("figures/mitotox DILIrank cumulative.pdf",  width = 50, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

#------



#BSEP
ggplot(miscDistributionsBSEP, aes(x = medianBSEPIC50, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange","Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "BSEP IC50 [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_log10()

ggsave("figures/BSEPIC50 DILIrank prob distribution.pdf",  width = 50, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

# ggplot(miscDistributionsBSEP, aes(x =  DILIConcern, y = medianBSEPIC50)) +
#   geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DILIConcern)) + scale_y_log10() +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
#   labs(
#     x = "BSEP IC50 [µM]"
#   ) +
#   theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
#   theme(
#     axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
#     axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
#     legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
#     legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
#     strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
#   ) +
#    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
#   theme(legend.position = "none") +
#   scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
#     "Most-DILI-Concern" = "Most",
#     "Clinical Dev" = "Clinical Dev",
#     "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "Ambiguous",
#     "Less-DILI-Concern" = "Less",
#     "No-DILI-Concern" = "No"
#   ))+
#   scale_y_log10()
# 
# 
# ggsave("figures/BSEPIC50 DILIrank boxplot.pdf",  width = 50, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)
# 



ggplot(miscDistributionsBSEP, aes(x = medianBSEPIC50, fill = DILIConcern)) +
  geom_boxplot() + scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "BSEP IC50 [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


ggsave("figures/BSEPIC50 DILIrank boxplot horizontal.pdf",  width = 50, height = 23, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(miscDistributionsBSEP, aes(x = medianBSEPIC50, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "BSEP IC50 [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


ggsave("figures/BSEPIC50 DILIrank cumulative.pdf",  width = 50, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



#------

```



##Rule of two (lipo and dose)

```{r}
ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = CmaxDoseValue, y = ADMETLab_logP)) + 
  geom_point(aes(colour = DILIConcern)) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 3) + geom_vline(xintercept = 100) +
  # geom_vline(xintercept = 50, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Dose [mg]",
    y = "LogP"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


ggsave("figures/rule of two.pdf", width = 60, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = CmaxDoseValue, y = ADMETLab_logP)) + 
  geom_point(aes(colour = DILIConcern)) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 3) + geom_vline(xintercept = 100) +
  # geom_vline(xintercept = 50, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Dose [mg]",
    y = "LogP"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  )


ggsave("figures/rule of two legend.pdf",  width = 60, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



#---

miscDistributionsWide = miscDistributions  %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernWide))

miscDistributionsAWide = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP >= 3) %>%
  filter(CmaxDoseValue >= 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernWide))

table(miscDistributionsAWide$DILIConcernWide) / table(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide)

miscDistributionsBWide = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP < 3) %>%
  filter(CmaxDoseValue >= 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernWide))

table(miscDistributionsBWide$DILIConcernWide) / table(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide)

miscDistributionsCWide = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP >= 3) %>%
  filter(CmaxDoseValue < 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernWide))

table(miscDistributionsCWide$DILIConcernWide) / table(miscDistributions$DILIConcernWide)


miscDistributionsDWide = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP < 3) %>%
  filter(CmaxDoseValue < 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernWide))

table(miscDistributionsDWide$DILIConcernWide) / table(miscDistributions$DILIConcernWide)


miscDistributionsNonAWide = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP < 3 | CmaxDoseValue < 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernWide))

table(miscDistributionsNonAWide$DILIConcernWide) / table(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide)

print("wide")
#Sensitivity
Sensitivity = sum(miscDistributionsAWide$DILIConcernWide == "Less-Most-Clinical") / sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "Less-Most-Clinical" )
paste("Sens:", Sensitivity)


#Specificity
Specificity = (sum(miscDistributionsNonAWide$DILIConcernWide == "No") /  sum(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernWide == "No"))
paste("Spec:", Specificity)



#---
miscDistributionsNarrow = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))

miscDistributionsANarrow = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP >= 3) %>%
  filter(CmaxDoseValue >= 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))

table(miscDistributionsANarrow$DILIConcernNarrow) / table(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow)

miscDistributionsBNarrow = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP < 3) %>%
  filter(CmaxDoseValue >= 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))

table(miscDistributionsBNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow) / table(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow)

miscDistributionsCNarrow = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP >= 3) %>%
  filter(CmaxDoseValue < 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))

table(miscDistributionsCNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow) / table(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow)


miscDistributionsDNarrow = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP < 3) %>%
  filter(CmaxDoseValue < 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))

table(miscDistributionsDNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow) / table(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow)


miscDistributionsNonANarrow = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(ADMETLab_logP < 3 | CmaxDoseValue < 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))

table(miscDistributionsNonANarrow$DILIConcernNarrow) / table(miscDistributionsWide$DILIConcernNarrow)


print("narrow")
#Sensitivity
Sensitivity = sum(miscDistributionsANarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "Most-Clinical") / sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "Most-Clinical" )
paste("Sens:", Sensitivity)


#Specificity
Specificity = (sum(miscDistributionsNonANarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "No") /  sum(miscDistributionsNarrow$DILIConcernNarrow == "No"))
paste("Spec:", Specificity)




#---
ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = CmaxDoseValue, y = ADMETLab_logP)) + 
  geom_point(aes(colour = log10(medianCmax))) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_x_log10() + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 3) + geom_vline(xintercept = 100) +
  # geom_vline(xintercept = 50, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Dose [mg]",
    y = "LogP"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


ggsave("figures/rule of two for Cmax coloured.pdf",  width = 90, height = 70, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


```

##Lowest POD (plots)
```{r}

#LowestPOD
ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = lowestPOD, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange","Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Lowest Tox Activity [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_log10()

ggsave("figures/lowestPOD prob distribution.pdf",  width = 50, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = lowestPOD, fill = DILIConcern)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Lowest Tox Activity [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_log10()


ggsave("figures/lowestPOD boxplot horizontal.pdf",  width = 50, height = 23, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(miscDistributions, aes(x = lowestPOD, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Lowest Tox Activity [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


ggsave("figures/lowestPOD cumulative.pdf",  width = 50, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


```

##Pred Cmax (plots)

```{r}
predictedCmaxValues = TopInSilico  %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")
  

ggplot(predictedCmaxValues, aes(x = firstPlasmaCmax, fill = DILIConcern)) + 
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +  # Use alpha to make overlapping areas visible
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange","Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Predicted Cmax [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_log10()

ggsave("figures/predCmax prob distribution.pdf",  width = 50, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(predictedCmaxValues, aes(x = firstPlasmaCmax, fill = DILIConcern)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  labs(
    x = "Predicted Cmax [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.4)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_log10()


ggsave("figures/predCmax boxplot horizontal.pdf",  width = 50, height = 23, units = "mm", dpi = 600)



ggplot(predictedCmaxValues, aes(x = firstPlasmaCmax, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Predicted Cmax [µM]"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


ggsave("figures/predCmax cumulative.pdf",  width = 50, height = 35, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


```


##BDDCS class
```{r}
miscDistributions$`Aleo2019BDDCS Class (Benet)`

exportBDDCS = miscDistributions %>%
  select(firstName, `Aleo2019BDDCS Class (Benet)`)
```


##Dose/Cmax/Lipo (ROC)

```{r}
metrics = c("medianCmax", "CmaxDoseValue", "ADMETLab_logD", "ADMETLab_logP")

output = data.frame(metric = NA, ROC_AUC = NA, sensitivity = NA, specificity = NA, threshold = NA)
addRowTemplate = output

numberOfCompounds = nrow(miscDistributions)
for (metric in metrics){
  
  currentMetric = miscDistributions %>%
    mutate(currentRatio = !!sym(metric))
  
  addRow = addRowTemplate
  
  roc_obj = suppressMessages(roc(BinaryDILIConsensus ~ currentRatio, data = currentMetric,
              levels = c("Safe", "Risk"), quiet = T, na.rm = T))
  
  addRow$metric = metric
  addRow$ROC_AUC = auc(roc_obj)
  
  if (metric == "medianCmax"){
    thresholdValue = 1.1
  } else if (metric == "CmaxDoseValue"){
    thresholdValue = 100
  } else if (metric == "ADMETLab_logP"){
    thresholdValue = 3
  } else if (metric == "ADMETLab_logD"){
    thresholdValue = 3
  }
  
  coordsValues = coords(roc_obj,
                            # "best",
                            x = thresholdValue , input = "threshold",
                             ret = c("sensitivity", "specificity", "threshold"))
  
  addRow$sensitivity = coordsValues$sensitivity
  addRow$specificity = coordsValues$specificity
  addRow$threshold = coordsValues$threshold
  
  output = rbind(output, addRow)
}
output = output[-1,]
```


##LogP/Dose/Cmax: ROC curve (Narrow)

```{r}
miscDistributionsNarrow = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))  %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")

#LogP
rocObjLogPNarrow = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ ADMETLab_logP, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
              levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjLogPNarrow)
rocLogPNarrow <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjLogPNarrow$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjLogPNarrow$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)


#Dose
rocObjDoseNarrow = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ CmaxDoseValue, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
              levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjDoseNarrow)
rocDoseNarrow <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjDoseNarrow$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjDoseNarrow$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)



#Cmax
rocObjCmaxNarrow = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ medianCmax, data = miscDistributionsNarrow,
              levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjCmaxNarrow)
rocCmaxNarrow <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjCmaxNarrow$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjCmaxNarrow$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)


rocLogPNarrow$Parameter <- "LogP"
rocDoseNarrow$Parameter <- "Dose"
rocCmaxNarrow$Parameter <- "Cmax"


# Combine data frames into a single dataframe
roc_combined <- rbind(rocLogPNarrow, rocDoseNarrow,
                      rocCmaxNarrow)

roc_combined$Parameter = factor(roc_combined$Parameter, levels = c("LogP",
                                                                             "Dose",
                                                                             "Cmax"))
ggplot(roc_combined, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr, colour = Parameter)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  
  # scale_colour_manual(values = c("Wide" = "blue",  "Narrow" = "black"))
  

ggsave("figures/Narrow ROC Heuristics.pdf",  width = 38, height = 30, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


```


##LogP/Dose/Cmax: ROC curve (Wide)

```{r}
miscDistributionsWide = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernWide))  %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")

#LogP
rocObjLogPWide = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernWide ~ ADMETLab_logP, data = miscDistributionsWide,
              levels = c("No", "Less-Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjLogPWide)
rocLogPWide <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjLogPWide$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjLogPWide$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)


#Dose
rocObjDoseWide = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernWide ~ CmaxDoseValue, data = miscDistributionsWide,
              levels = c("No", "Less-Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjDoseWide)
rocDoseWide <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjDoseWide$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjDoseWide$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)



#Cmax
rocObjCmaxWide = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernWide ~ medianCmax, data = miscDistributionsWide,
              levels = c("No", "Less-Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjCmaxWide)
rocCmaxWide <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjCmaxWide$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjCmaxWide$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)


rocLogPWide$Parameter <- "LogP"
rocDoseWide$Parameter <- "Dose"
rocCmaxWide$Parameter <- "Cmax"


# Combine data frames into a single dataframe
roc_combined <- rbind(rocLogPWide, rocDoseWide,
                      rocCmaxWide)

roc_combined$Parameter = factor(roc_combined$Parameter, levels = c("LogP",
                                                                             "Dose",
                                                                             "Cmax"))
ggplot(roc_combined, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr, colour = Parameter)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  
  # scale_colour_manual(values = c("Wide" = "blue",  "Wide" = "black"))
  

ggsave("figures/Wide ROC Heuristics.pdf",  width = 38, height = 30, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


```

##BSEP/Cyto/.../Lowest POD: ROC curve (Narrow)

```{r}
miscDistributionsBSEPNarrow = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianBSEPIC50)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))  %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")

miscDistributionsCytoToxNarrow = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestCytoTox)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))  %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")

miscDistributionsMitoToxNarrow = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestMitoTox)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))  %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")


miscDistributionslowestPODNarrow = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))  %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")


TopInSilicoNarrow = TopInSilico %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernNarrow))  %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")

#BSEPIC50
rocObjBSEPNarrow = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ medianBSEPIC50, data = miscDistributionsBSEPNarrow,
              levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjBSEPNarrow)
rocBSEPNarrow <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjBSEPNarrow$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjBSEPNarrow$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)

#Cytotox
rocObjCytoNarrow = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ lowestCytoTox, data = miscDistributionsCytoToxNarrow,
              levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjCytoNarrow)
rocCytoNarrow <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjCytoNarrow$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjCytoNarrow$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)

#MitoTox
rocObjMitoNarrow = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ lowestMitoTox, data = miscDistributionsMitoToxNarrow,
              levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjMitoNarrow)
rocMitoNarrow <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjMitoNarrow$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjMitoNarrow$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)


#lowestPOD
rocObjlowestPODNarrow = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ lowestPOD, data = miscDistributionslowestPODNarrow,
              levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjlowestPODNarrow)
roclowestPODNarrow <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjlowestPODNarrow$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjlowestPODNarrow$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)

roc_coordsbestLowestPOD = coords(rocObjlowestPODNarrow, x = "best",
                     ret = c("threshold", "specificity", "sensitivity"))

#predCmax
rocObjpredCmaxNarrow = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernNarrow ~ firstPlasmaCmax, data = TopInSilicoNarrow,
              levels = c("No", "Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjpredCmaxNarrow)
rocpredCmaxNarrow <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjpredCmaxNarrow$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjpredCmaxNarrow$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)


rocBSEPNarrow$Parameter <- "BSEP"
rocCytoNarrow$Parameter <- "CytoTox"
rocMitoNarrow$Parameter <- "MitoTox"
roclowestPODNarrow$Parameter <- "Lowest Activity"
rocpredCmaxNarrow$Parameter <- "Predicted Cmax"

rocpredCmaxNarrow$Parameter = factor(rocpredCmaxNarrow$Parameter, levels = c("BSEP",
                                                                             "CytoTox",
                                                                             "MitoTox",
                                                                             "Lowest Activity",
                                                                             "Predicted Cmax"))
# Combine data frames into a single dataframe
roc_combined <- rbind(rocBSEPNarrow, rocCytoNarrow,
                      rocMitoNarrow, roclowestPODNarrow,
                      rocpredCmaxNarrow)

ggplot(roc_combined, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr, colour = Parameter)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  
  # scale_colour_manual(values = c("Wide" = "blue",  "Narrow" = "black"))
  

ggsave("figures/Narrow ROC In vitro activities and in silico.pdf",  width = 45, height = 30, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


```


##BSEP/Cyto/.../Lowest POD: ROC curve (Wide)

```{r}
miscDistributionsBSEPWide = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianBSEPIC50)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernWide))  %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")

miscDistributionsCytoToxWide = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestCytoTox)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernWide))  %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")

miscDistributionsMitoToxWide = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestMitoTox)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernWide))  %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")


miscDistributionslowestPODWide = miscDistributions %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernWide))  %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")


TopInSilicoWide = TopInSilico %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcernWide))  %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern == "Ambiguous-DILI-concern")

#BSEPIC50
rocObjBSEPWide = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernWide ~ medianBSEPIC50, data = miscDistributionsBSEPWide,
              levels = c("No", "Less-Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjBSEPWide)
rocBSEPWide <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjBSEPWide$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjBSEPWide$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)

#Cytotox
rocObjCytoWide = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernWide ~ lowestCytoTox, data = miscDistributionsCytoToxWide,
              levels = c("No", "Less-Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjCytoWide)
rocCytoWide <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjCytoWide$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjCytoWide$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)

#MitoTox
rocObjMitoWide = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernWide ~ lowestMitoTox, data = miscDistributionsMitoToxWide,
              levels = c("No", "Less-Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjMitoWide)
rocMitoWide <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjMitoWide$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjMitoWide$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)


#lowestPOD
rocObjlowestPODWide = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernWide ~ lowestPOD, data = miscDistributionslowestPODWide,
              levels = c("No", "Less-Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjlowestPODWide)
roclowestPODWide <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjlowestPODWide$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjlowestPODWide$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)


#predCmax
rocObjpredCmaxWide = suppressMessages(roc(DILIConcernWide ~ firstPlasmaCmax, data = TopInSilicoWide,
              levels = c("No", "Less-Most-Clinical"), quiet = T, na.rm = T, grid = T))
auc(rocObjpredCmaxWide)
rocpredCmaxWide <- data.frame(
  fpr = rev(rocObjpredCmaxWide$specificities), # False Positive Rate = 1 - Specificity
  tpr = rev(rocObjpredCmaxWide$sensitivities)  # True Positive Rate = Sensitivity
)


rocBSEPWide$Parameter <- "BSEP"
rocCytoWide$Parameter <- "CytoTox"
rocMitoWide$Parameter <- "MitoTox"
roclowestPODWide$Parameter <- "Lowest Activity"
rocpredCmaxWide$Parameter <- "Predicted Cmax"

rocpredCmaxWide$Parameter = factor(rocpredCmaxWide$Parameter, levels = c("BSEP",
                                                                             "CytoTox",
                                                                             "MitoTox",
                                                                             "Lowest Activity",
                                                                             "Predicted Cmax"))
# Combine data frames into a single dataframe
roc_combined <- rbind(rocBSEPWide, rocCytoWide,
                      rocMitoWide, roclowestPODWide,
                      rocpredCmaxWide)

ggplot(roc_combined, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr, colour = Parameter)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  ) 
  # theme(legend.position = "none")  
  # scale_colour_manual(values = c("Wide" = "blue",  "Narrow" = "black"))
  

ggsave("figures/Legend Wide ROC In vitro activities and in silico.pdf",  width = 45, height = 30, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

ggplot(roc_combined, aes(x = 1 - fpr, y = tpr, colour = Parameter)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")  +
  labs(
    x = "1-Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +  # base size for text
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)  # if using facets
  )  +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  
  # scale_colour_manual(values = c("Wide" = "blue",  "Narrow" = "black"))
  

ggsave("figures/Wide ROC In vitro activities and in silico.pdf",  width = 45, height = 30, units = "mm", dpi = 600)
```


##Bar: Rel Cmax
```{r}
relCmax = TopInVivo %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  filter(!PODValueSources == "medianBSEPIC50;") %>%
  mutate(relCmax = medianCmax/1.1) %>%
  arrange(relCmax) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

ggplot(relCmax, aes(x = rowID, y = relCmax)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(relCmax, aes(x = rowID, y = relCmax)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = DILIRankBinary)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

```



##List of false pos/neg
```{r}
potFalsePos = relCmax %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(BinaryDILIConsensus)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(relCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  arrange(desc(relCmax)) %>%
  filter(relCmax > 1) %>%
  filter(!BinaryDILIConsensus == "Risk") %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
  select(-c(1:35)) %>%
  select(compoundName, DILIConcern, BinaryDILIConsensus, PODValues, PODValueSources,
         medianCmax, CmaxDoseValue, CmaxDoseUnit, CmaxValueSources, relCmax, RatioLowestPOD)


potFalsePos = a %>%
  filter(grepl("uaneth", compoundName)) %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
  select(-c(1:35)) %>%
  select(compoundName, DILIConcern, BinaryDILIConsensus, PODValues, PODValueSources,
         medianCmax, CmaxDoseValue, CmaxDoseUnit, CmaxValueSources,  RatioLowestPOD)

```

##Cumulative Dist: Cmax
```{r}
ggplot(relCmax, aes(x = relCmax, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1)

ggplot(relCmax, aes(x = relCmax, colour = BinaryDILIConsensus ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1)

```


##Bar: Rel Dose
```{r}
relDose = TopInVivo %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  mutate(relDose = CmaxDoseValue/100) %>%
  arrange(relDose) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

ggplot(relDose, aes(x = rowID, y = relDose)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(relDose, aes(x = rowID, y = relDose)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = DILIRankBinary)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

```


##Bar: Rel Cmax Predicted
```{r}
relPredCmax = TopInSilico %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(firstPlasmaCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  mutate(relPredCmax = firstPlasmaCmax/1.1) %>%
  arrange(relPredCmax) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

ggplot(relPredCmax, aes(x = rowID, y = relPredCmax)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

ggplot(relPredCmax, aes(x = rowID, y = relPredCmax)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = DILIRankBinary)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300"))  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+ scale_y_log10()

```



##Cumulative Dist: Cmax
```{r}
ggplot(relPredCmax, aes(x = relPredCmax, colour = DILIConcern ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red",  "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1)

ggplot(relPredCmax, aes(x = relPredCmax, colour = BinaryDILIConsensus ))  +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Risk" = "red",  "Safe" = "#00E300")) + scale_x_log10() + geom_vline(xintercept = 1)

```

##Correlation BSEP vs Other PODs
```{r}
ggplot(TopInVivo, aes(x = lowestnonBSEPPOD, y = medianBSEPIC50 )) + geom_point() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1) + scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10()
```
Is BSEP adding value?
```{r}
k = TopInVivo %>%
  filter(!is.na(DILIConcern)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianBSEPIC50)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lowestnonBSEPPOD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(medianCmax)) %>%
  filter(!DILIConcern %in% c("Ambiguous-DILI-concern")) %>%
  # filter(!PODValueSources == "medianBSEPIC50;") %>%
  mutate(RatioBase25Diff = RatioLowestPODBase0_25 - RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25) %>%
  arrange(RatioBase25Diff) %>%
  mutate(rowID = row_number())

ggplot(k, aes(x = rowID, y = RatioBase25Diff )) +
   geom_bar(stat = "identity", aes(fill = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red", "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) 

ggplot(k, aes(x = RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, y = RatioLowestPODBase0_25 )) +
   geom_point(aes(colour = `DILIConcern`)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Most-DILI-Concern" = "red", "Clinical Dev" = "darkred", "Ambiguous-DILI-concern" = "orange", "Less-DILI-Concern" = "#FFEA00",  "No-DILI-Concern" = "#00E300")) +
  scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() + geom_abline() + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed")
```

Compounds with BSEP IC50 << Other POD
```{r}
# BSEPSpecificCompounds = TopInVivo %>%
#   filter(RatioLowestPODBase0_25 > 1)%>%
#   filter(RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25 < 1)%>%
#   filter(!is.na(nonBSEPPODValues)) %>%
#   filter(medianBSEPIC50 < lowestnonBSEPPOD) %>%
#   mutate(ratioBSEPtoOtherPOD = medianBSEPIC50/lowestnonBSEPPOD) %>%
#   filter(ratioBSEPtoOtherPOD < 0.2) %>%
#   arrange(ratioBSEPtoOtherPOD) %>%
#   select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
#   select(compoundName, firstName, DILIConcern, ratioBSEPtoOtherPOD,  medianCmax, medianBSEPIC50,
#          lowestnonBSEPPOD,
#          RatioBSEPBase0_25, RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, PODValues, PODValueSources, CmaxValues,
#          CmaxValueSources)
# 
# 
# BSEPSpecificCompoundsWithoutLowestnonBSEPPOD = TopInVivo %>%
#   mutate(RatioBSEP > 1) %>%
#   filter(ratioBSEPtoOtherPOD < 0.2) %>%
#   arrange(ratioBSEPtoOtherPOD) %>%
#   select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
#   select(compoundName, firstName, DILIConcern, ratioBSEPtoOtherPOD,  medianCmax, medianBSEPIC50,
#          lowestnonBSEPPOD,
#          RatioBSEPBase0_25, RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, PODValues, PODValueSources, CmaxValues,
#          CmaxValueSources)
```


Known Cholestasis/BSEP Positives
```{r}
BSEPPositivesCompounds = TopInVivo %>%
  filter(grepl("osentan", compoundName)) %>%
  mutate(ratioBSEPtoOtherPOD = medianBSEPIC50/lowestnonBSEPPOD) %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
  select(compoundName, firstName, DILIConcern, ratioBSEPtoOtherPOD,  medianCmax, medianBSEPIC50,
         lowestnonBSEPPOD,
         RatioBSEPBase0_25, RatioLowestnonBSEPPODBase0_25, PODValues, PODValueSources, CmaxValues,
         CmaxValueSources)
```


##More Stats

number of PODs per compound
```{r}
sort(table(TopInVivo$numOfPODValues))
ggplot(TopInVivo, aes(x = numOfPODValues)) + geom_histogram(binwidth = 1)
```



##Correlation Cholestasis vs Less DILI

```{r}
table_AB <- table(TopInVivo$cholestasisIntegrated, TopInVivo$DILIConcern)
table_AB
TopInVivoChiSqu = TopInVivo %>%
  filter(DILIConcern %in% c("No-DILI-Concern", "Less-DILI-Concern",
                            "Most-DILI-Concern"))
TopInVivoChiSqu$DILIConcern = as.character(TopInVivoChiSqu$DILIConcern)
table_AB <- table(TopInVivoChiSqu$cholestasisIntegrated, TopInVivoChiSqu$DILIConcern)
table_AB

chisq.test(table_AB)

```


##Final Summary Figure

```{r}
library(scales)

summaryResults = data.frame(
  Name =  c("LogP", "Dose", "Rule of Two", "In vivo Cmax", "In silico Cmax",
            "Lowest in vitro Activity",
            "2a (mech.)", "2a (ideal)", "2b (mech.)", "2b (ideal)",
            "3a (mech.)", "3a (ideal)", "3b (mech.)", "3b (ideal)",
            "BSEP alone (mech.)", "BSEP alone (ideal)", "PBBA"),
  Sensitivity = c(0.616, 0.795, 0.455, 0.821, 0.812,
                  0.705,
                  0.509, 0.973, 0.554, 0.929,
                  0.500, 0.911, 0.554, 0.920,
                  0.420, 0.926, 0.222),
  Specificity = c(0.391, 0.826, 0.913, 0.935, 0.913,
                  0.667,
                  1.0, 0.842, 1.0, 0.891,
                  0.947, 0.842, 0.957, 0.812,
                  1.0, 0.920, 1.0),
  AUC =         c(0.558, 0.898, NA, 0.931, 0.905,
                  0.6734,
                  0.965, 0.965, 0.968, 0.968,
                  0.923, 0.923, 0.937, 0.937,
                  0.964, 0.964, 0.617)
)

summaryResults = summaryResults %>%
  mutate(BalancedAccuracy = signif((Sensitivity + Specificity)/2, 3))


summaryResults$Name = factor(summaryResults$Name, levels = c("LogP", "Dose", "Rule of Two", "In vivo Cmax", "In silico Cmax", "Lowest in vitro Activity",
            "2a (mech.)", "2a (ideal)", "2b (mech.)", "2b (ideal)",
            "3a (mech.)", "3a (ideal)", "3b (mech.)", "3b (ideal)",
            "BSEP alone (mech.)", "BSEP alone (ideal)", "PBBA"))



summaryResults = summaryResults %>%
  filter(!grepl("PBBA|alone|a ", Name))
```

```{r}
df_long <- summaryResults %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Sensitivity, Specificity, BalancedAccuracy, AUC),
               names_to = "Metric",
               values_to = "Value")

all_colours <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n = 4, name = "Paired")

# Use the last 4 (i.e., starting from the 3rd)
my_colours <- all_colours

```


```{r}
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Name, y = Value, fill = Metric)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colours, name = "Metric") +
  labs(x = "Method", y = "Percentage") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Name, y = Value, fill = Metric)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~Metric, ncol = 2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colours, name = "Metric") + 
  labs(x = "Method", y = "Percentage") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none",  
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  )

```

```{r}
df_longIdeal = df_long %>%
  filter(!grepl("mech", Name))

df_longMech = df_long %>%
  filter(!grepl("ideal", Name))

```

```{r}
ggplot(df_longIdeal, aes(x = Name, y = Value, fill = Metric)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colours, name = "Metric") +
  labs(x = "Method", y = "Percentage") +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_blank()
  )

ggsave("figures/Summary Figure.pdf",  width = 95, height = 40, units = "mm", dpi = 600)


ggplot(df_longMech, aes(x = Name, y = Value, fill = Metric)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colours, name = "Metric") +
  labs(x = "Method", y = "Percentage") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(df_longIdeal, aes(x = Name, y = Value, fill = Metric)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~Metric, ncol = 2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colours, name = "Metric") + 
  labs(x = "Method", y = "Percentage") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none",  
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  )

ggplot(df_longMech, aes(x = Name, y = Value, fill = Metric)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~Metric, ncol = 2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colours, name = "Metric") + 
  labs(x = "Method", y = "Percentage") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none",  
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  )

```
